programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: The visit to the beauty parlor turns into a real competition full of funny situations and awkward moments. These "smart" girls are ready to do all kinds of crazy things to become the most beautiful vegetable in the world!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: The first relationship is hard, but very cool! You learn to love together, accept each other's demons, face your love problems together and solve them together That is why it is so difficult to decide who your true soulmate is

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: There are types of people you can see on every beach. Teenz are no different from any other teenagers! They also adore having picnics sunbathing playing sports and swimming and simply having the time of their lives on the beach!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: The first relationship is hard, but very cool! You learn to love together, accept each other's demons, face your love problems together and solve them together. Today we'll show funny relationship situations that will make you smile.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Cado loves play video games! One day instead to be boring at home Cado became a participant of 8-Bit Game! He must complete all the levels to find a way out and save the beautiful Ava. Will he be able to find the courage to reach the end?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Teenage life is full of surprises. Boom and you fall in love It happened to the cute zombie Creepy and the sullen unicorn Dark

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Meet Light and Dark , twin unicorns with a special ability to turn their drawings into reality! What kind of funny situations will they get into during school?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Be in couple is hard, but very cool! You learn to love together, accept each other's demons, face your love problems together and solve them together. That is why it is so difficult to decide who your true soulmate is.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Everything has two sides: the good side and the bad side! Same goes with eternal long vs short battle. Yeah, long legs are cool, sure! But they can be the source of problems and awkward situations, too! There's no right or wrong here. Just appreciate what you have, long and short are both beautiful You thought that long-legged girls are always doing well? No, they have their own problems too!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Younger siblings may be soooo cute But when they don't get what they want, they turn into literal devils And then, look out! Zombie apocalypse is upon us!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Have I ever had a crazy manicure? Maybe you want to try? Bully decided that with long nails and even hair it is not convenient to train. But they look charming

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Have you ever been in a similarly awkward situation? Being in awkward situations is a nightmare for vegetables. We showed funny relationship situations that will make you smile. Check it out!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Do funny situations happen to you regularly? With Cado all the time! And at home, and at work, and in public places. No need to worry, just laugh, because laughter is a real antidepressant! Watch our video, get to know yourself!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: There are a loooot of annoying problems only girls can understand… But all teenz (boys and girls) have something in common: their problems and fails result in funny situations!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Are you a nerd or a popular student ? Who cares?! We can all have fun together; it’s just about finding the right vibe!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Imagine you live in a palace, go to balls, and dance with magical animals. You think the life of a princess is full of fun and entertainment?! Nope! Princess's struggles and problems are real!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Disney princesses are pregnant! Do you know what it means? It means that today we showed different types of pregnant women, and every pregnancy has its own funny moments and incredible situations. The story will be full of awkward situations and clumsy moments, we promise.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: A mysterious creepy girl joins Pinky's class... Now Pinky's life turns into a never-ending nightmare! Who is she and why is she so mean to Pinky?! And she is here to ruin Pinky's perfect life, make her friends turn their backs on her and steal her boyfriend!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: You may not want to admit it, but you love fast food! Who doesn’t? Avocados love to eat too! But even they have to pull themselves together and go in for sports and healthy eating.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Being popular is not all fun and games. But trying to be the perfect popular girl, boy, student, model, music star or internet sensation is exhausting... You know what makes our teenz so adorable and relatable, right? The fact that they're not, in fact, perfect!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Today we are going to watch cool stories about magical Gender switch, Body swap and changing from a boy to girl situations! Our first story is about naughty boys who were mocking a powerful witch and then they were sent to Another Dimension! And more to that, they are pretty girls now! They need to compete in basketball match to be able to come back home, but also, it's always a good time for an Extreme Makeover! Maybe this is a beginning of something new? Let's see in the future! Also our other favourite couples will face some struggles in their relationship and we hope magic will only help them, and not make everything worse...

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava wants to become a professional ballerina, but nobody believes in her. And one day she meets ex-ballerina, who was popular in the past, and starts training with her. But this ballerina has very strange ways of training. Could Ava become a real ballerina? Or nobody will see her talent?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: What is Pinky's secret identity? Who is her evil twin and what is it feels like to kiss your crush grandmother? And what to do if your girlfriend suddenly becomes a boy?! On all that questions and some more, you can find all the answers in this episode!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Can two worlds meet in reality? Can monsters and people fall in love with each other? Don’t miss episode, where monsters meet DUH students, where love and hate go hand in hand, where characters appear from nowhere and…disappear!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava is a real nerd girl and doesn't have any besties. But accidentally she gots a strange friend, who changes her life! Now Ava should choose different options to become popular and have fun! But her monster friend sometimes does very weird things.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Let's face it, being a girl isn’t easy. All of us get into awkward situations from time to time. But Ava has managed to break all the records for having embarrassing moments... It seems like it will never end, but you can always turn the day around.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: What a sad story! Pinky was turned into baby again! Pinky is the cutest baby, but she is the most annoying one, too! Pranks and tricks of baby Pinky will be merciless!

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.desc: Ms. Teacher prefers TV over her students and dates. That's why she uses the most fun magic hacks to avoid it. But the magical life makes its own adjustments.

programme.title: TeenVee

Use awesome hair tricks and hacks, of course. Find it out in my new episode about everyday hair problems and funny situations

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Moms can be so different. I mean moms can be fun or strict, warm or cold, and we sometimes wish our moms would be different! Avocados teen want to make new friends at school, but moms get involved. Annoying moms are a nightmare! What other problems do teens have in world of vegetables?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: We all know that opposites attract Sweet Pinky and cheeky Grinny are no exception After all, these two girls are best friends This means that they are always ready for the most unexpected adventures!

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava and Cado want to become parents. They come to a special place, where baby robots are made. Could Avocado Couple gets their own baby? Or Robot couldn't be a real kid? It's no surprise Avocado love kids and it doesn't matter if these kids can't behave! One day Ava and Cado adopted a baby devil! Baby Devil has some problems with emotions control, but he loves his new parents and would love to become a little angel child. Will the baby change his behavior?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Going back to school is always fun , especially when you are waiting to meet with your favorite teachers. There is always a lot of adventure at school... like jokes and pranks

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie is given the keys to a five million dollar Pagani Huayra L’Ultimo as she explores the sub-culture of lowriders with the seal of approval from Horacio Pagani himself. Will she be accepted into this tribe?

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie arrives in ‘Motor City’ in the dead of winter but given access to a half million dollar new Ford GT raises her spirits. Her goal is to learn more about muscle cars, born in Detroit, and her journey takes her in different directions.

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles
programme.desc: Founder of The Gymkhana Grid and viral superstar, Ken Block, gives a detailed account of the creation of one of the fastest growing events in the world.

programme.title: Gymkhana Grid Profiles
programme.desc: The world-famous Boyzone band is back on tour but for Shane Lynch, his true passion is motorsport. He hangs up his microphone and gets behind the wheel.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: El Nino
programme.desc: Trevor Carlson puts everything on the line to chase monster waves from Maui, Hawaii to Ensenada, Mexico.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters: El Nino
programme.desc: Brad Domke aims for the big wave surfing history books by skimming the big waves of Pe’ahi.

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: Wingsuit flying is among the most dangerous sports in the world. How do Espen, Jokke and Niccolo manage to stay alive?

programme.title: Locals
programme.desc: Locals

programme.title: Born To
programme.desc: Hailing from Portugal and some of the best surfs in the world, Frederico Morais has always had his heart set on being one of the top surfers in the world.

programme.title: Extreme E Desert X Prix 2025
programme.desc: Welcome to the inaugural FIA Extreme H World Cup! Racing roars to life with the thrilling ‘final fling’ Extreme E Desert X Prix, closing the Extreme E chapter before the all-new Extreme H era takes over.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi, guys! Today we're gonna make a tamagotchi house for Teemo the scout! Each of you must have heard about Tamagotchi! This is a cool fun interactive toy that needs to be looked after! So, we will do something similar, but out of paper! We will need to draw several locations, as well as the outfits for the character. Each of you must have heard about Tamagotchi! This is a cool fun interactive toy that needs to be looked after! So, we will do something similar, but out of paper! So, how do we put it on paper? Easily! We will create our own games using only paper, tape, markers, a cutter, and our imagination! So watch this video till the end to see what a wonderful craft we've got!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Oh, no! We need a Dreem Team to Save the World! Let's transforfm your dolls into Superheroes! Now Noboby will Disturbed the Toy Сity!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Barbie dolls came to Sam and Sue's beauty studio today. And they urgently need help in makeover! Our dolls will never forget this beauty day! We will create miniature make-up, accessories, jewelry, and much more, so girls will definitely be satisfied!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey everyone! Today Sam and Sue were playing "Luigi's Mansion". And they realized that they missed the most important prop - the mansion itself! So, let's create it! We will try to replicate Luigi's Mansion, so our version will also have a tiled roof, many windows and a mysterious door, a spooky fence to trap the ghosts inside, and even a few graves in the yard. We will also decorate the yard with unusual trees, lawns, and stones. And, of course, what would Luigi's mansion be without Luigi himself? Also we'll make something unique very soon. We're going to make a Peppa Piggy's Glitch Room to scare Roger. The most frightful things happen in ordinary places. Like, in the Friday Night Funkin' universe! The Darkness came, and everyone started to glitch. We just need the right place to begin with! So, we will make a glitch room with creepy characters. So stay tuned! We hope you liked our new crafts!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hello, friends! Today we will craft fantastic paper houses for two families. Choose which place you want to build: a cute pink house for Princess Rapunzel or a gloomy and mysterious one for Mavis Dracula. Now let's get started! But that's not all, Sue opened her own nail salon today. But it's not quite ordinary, but the world's first paper nail salon! Many customers are already waiting for their turn. Smooth skin, even nails, awesome nail art? Sue can do it all! She also has so many cool fake nail designs! Just choose what you want! You can open your own paper nail salon as well. Just check out how easy it is!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Are you Tired of the Mess? You need to orginize your Chaos! Let's find out how to make the Best Organizers for your Home!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today, Princess Jasmine received a bunch of gifts. Stop wondering, and let's get to the unboxing part! How can we celebrate any birthday without a cake? Today we're going to make a very unusual cake. We will make a cake in the form of Snow White!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Sammy is having another fun day at school! And today, he will help the girls bring beauty into their daily routine! You will see helpful and simple beauty tips and life hacks that you can easily apply yourself! Sammy's classmates Nancy and Katy are arguing over whose doll is better. But the trouble is, the lesson has already begun! It looks like the girls will have to continue their argument in class and compete in making crafts for dolls! What are they going to make? Watch this video till the end !

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Today we will celebrate two unusual birthdays. Who do you think are the birthday girls? Mermaids! We will decorate the room with beautiful balloons, tables with shiny tablecloths, and make a few gift boxes. Do you want more fantastic crafts? Of course we've got a lot of ideas for you! Today Sam decided to host the Wheel of Fortune show! Our contestants, Susan and Samantha, will make many fantastic crafts for school, and you will choose who did better! Susan thinks that the most magical creature on the planet is Unicorn, and Samantha thinks it's Mermaid. Now they need to make all the crafts with these creatures. You will definitely enjoy making these cute unicorn crafts and mermaid school supplies!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi guys! Today we will make some very cool crafts. Firstly, it will be a powerful Thor's hammer, and secondly, simple paper games for the company! Well, let's go?

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Do you wanna have a cute little monster in your house? We do! That's why we decided to grow our own clay dinosaur! Let's make a baby version of Klombo from Fortnite! Also, We are going to make Monty Gator, or rather, only his head! This craft is gonna be made of our favorite material - cardboard and will consist of two parts - the upper and the lower jaw. Now Sammy has a great patient who will let him check all his teeth!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Cool crafts that you can easily make yourself!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: We're gonna have a super race today! As you might have guessed, we are about to create an incredible training module for racing. And for this, we need cardboard. A lot of cardboard! Because Sam and Sue decided to make one more unusual craft - a magic typewriter ! We bet everyone would want to quickly sit down and try it out! We are sure many of you once dreamed of it! So, if you like our craft, try crafting it yourself. As you can see, no special tools are needed here.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hey, guys! Today we'll draw a picture with paper napkins and with dots that you can easily repeat! So forget the brushes this time. You will be surprised what results can be achieved with ordinary paper napkins! We will draw a magnificent feather of a fabulous bird! This video will show you how to paint a picturesque landscape without mixing colors in the palette. We don't need it at all because we will work straight on canvas! We will use the fantastic idea of painting with dots. This is a simple technique that even a beginner can use! Guys, you can choose any colors you like and paint your own inspiring picture! Try it. It's easy!

programme.desc: Transform ordinary pens into fun, character-inspired creations with easy, Inside Out-themed crafts! Plus, discover 5 genius school life hacks that will make your daily routine smoother and more stylish. Perfect for students looking to add some flair to their school supplies!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Dive into creative fun with DIY projects like a sparkly mermaid treasure chest and a secret candy box to hide your treats! Learn how to craft with clay, sparkle up your designs, and unlock your crafty potential with these easy and imaginative creations.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Discover the secrets to mixing colors and create 16 new shades with just 5 primary colors! Plus, learn easy art techniques to kickstart your creative journey with basic lessons perfect for beginners. Unleash your inner artist with these simple yet effective tips!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Create a cute, colorful 5-room house for Kitty and friends, plus a tiny dollhouse in a box! Discover fun, easy DIY techniques using clay and cardboard to craft your own miniature world. Perfect for crafting enthusiasts !

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for Halloween with a spooky DIY haunted house and a magical transformation of a doll into Elphaba, the Wicked Witch! Unleash your creativity with these eerie and enchanting projects that will bring your Halloween decorations and costumes to life.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Unleash your creativity and build your dream superhero home with this epic step-by-step guide! From transforming ordinary cardboard into epic, functional furniture to creating superhero-inspired rooms, this DIY tutorial takes you through every stage of crafting your ultimate superhero hideout. Perfect for fans of superhero adventures and DIY builders!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Hi friends! You know that we love the Inside Out story, right? So, today, we decided to make no more, no less, but the whole set of nesting dolls, and each one of them is going to represent a certain emotion. How cool is that? Come on, grab some lemonade, hit play, and enjoy!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready to throw an unforgettable Moana-themed party with these fun and easy DIY decorations and craft ideas! From island-inspired decor to cute party crafts, this guide will help you create a mini adventure that’s perfect for any Moana fan!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Create the perfect heart-shaped organizer for your desk and candy stash! Learn an easy technique to draw stunning romantic scenery using unusual acrylic paints. This DIY is perfect for adding a touch of charm and creativity to your workspace!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Transform your doll into a stunning mermaid in no time! Learn how to create a magical mermaid outfit with just a hot glue gun and a few simple materials. This fun and easy DIY is perfect for doll lovers looking to add a splash of creativity to their collection!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Unleash your inner witch with a Wicked-inspired beauty routine for Elphaba! DIY your very own paper beauty box filled with magical surprises and kawaii school supplies. Watch as we create mystery blind baggies with all things cute and enchanting – perfect for fans of Wicked and all things whimsical!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Learn how to craft your very own Whack-a-Mole game using cardboard, and discover the secrets behind a mind-blowing magic trick! This DIY project combines the fun of crafting with a magical twist, perfect for anyone looking to add a little creativity and wonder to their day.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for some gooey fun with easy and safe experiments! Watch as we fix the cheapest sticky goo and dive into satisfying science experiments with liquids and slime. Perfect for anyone who loves a little hands-on creativity and a lot of squishy satisfaction!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for some hands-on fun with this DIY paper hospital playbook and doctor kit! Learn how to craft your own paper stethoscopes, bandages, patient charts, and more in this step-by-step guide. Perfect for little doctors and creative minds who want to explore the world of medicine with a fun, paper-powered twist!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get creative in the kitchen with these fun and vibrant cookie and rainbow dessert recipes! From chewy cookies to colorful confections, learn how to make your treats as bright and delicious as a rainbow. Perfect for celebrations or just satisfying your sweet tooth!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Create your own magical winter retreat for Elsa with this fun DIY project! Build a charming mini house complete with frosty decor, snowflakes, and icy touches. Perfect for crafting enthusiasts and Frozen fans alike!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Turn your cardboard into a creative, portable Barbie house with this simple and fun DIY! Learn how to make a mini swimming pool party setup, complete with lounge areas and pool accessories for dolls. Perfect for imaginative play and crafting enthusiasts!

programme.title: Midnight Foundation and the Power of Privacy in Blockchain
programme.desc: Join us for an insightful episode of The Edge of Show as we dive deep into the world of blockchain technology with Fahmi Syed, the president of Midnight Foundation. Recorded live at Creative Blockchain Week, Fahmi shares his journey from traditional finance to the innovative realm of blockchain, discussing the importance of privacy, governance, and the future of digital systems.

programme.title: Spotlight - Eden Energy
programme.desc: Join EDEN as they step on stage with a simple message. With EDEN waste will power the future. EDEN systems convert mixed carbon based waste into: • clean electricity • clean fuels • bio and hydrochar for soil • recoverable grey water Waste is no longer a liability, it is now an asset. The solution to pollution is here and EDEN will be restored.

programme.desc: Spotlight - Nisa Amoils, Managing Partner at A100x Ventures

programme.title: INCOMING BLACKROCK CRYPTO BOMBSHELL (BITCOIN SHORT SQUEEZE NOW)
programme.desc: JPMorgan and Texas are making big moves with BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF, while BTC could be setting up for a massive short squeeze.

programme.title: Bitcoin Jesus: The Prosecution of Roger Ver
programme.desc: They call him “Bitcoin Jesus,” though he despises the nickname. His real name is Roger Ver. At any moment, Roger could be arrested for alleged tax evasion and mail fraud. But anyone familiar with his case knows the truth: Roger’s only “crime” was being the very first investor and passionate advocate for Bitcoin. For that, he faces 109 years in federal prison. As devastating as this is for Roger, this case is less about him and more about you.

programme.title: Spotlight - Nisa Amoils, Managing Partner at A100x Ventures
programme.desc: Spotlight - Nisa Amoils, Managing Partner at A100x Ventures

programme.title: Bitcoin’s Weirdest Cycle Yet: Why Nothing Looks Normal Anymore
programme.desc: Bitcoin is stuck. The market feels heavy. Sentiment is terrible. And yet, none of the traditional bull-market top signals have fired. Not a single one.

programme.title: AI Found Its Voice — and It’s Shockingly Human
programme.desc: What happens when artificial intelligence finally starts talking back? In this episode, Joel Comm explores the amazing (and sometimes hilarious) world of AI voice companions — real conversations with ChatGPT and Grok that sound surprisingly human. From coaching and pep talks to storytelling and stand-up comedy, you’ll see how these tools can talk, laugh, and even motivate you in ways that feel natural.

programme.title: AI Planned My Day… and It Actually Worked!
programme.desc: What if you let AI take over your daily schedule — meals, errands, work, and even what movie to watch?

programme.title: What Could Be Bad: Episode 201 - Just Scratch Your Nose with Victoria Arlen
programme.desc: Benj is joined by Victoria Arlen (ESPN Host, Author and Olympic Champion) in his happy place, the home his grandparents built decades ago in Connecticut. Chatting on the deck behind the house above a beautiful New England cove, the two share a conversation about their unique personal health challenges, the landscape of recovering both physically and mentally, and then moving forward with their lives. All through the lens of longstanding friendship and mutual respect.

programme.title: What Could Be Bad: Episode 201 - Just Scratch Your Nose with Victoria Arlen
programme.desc: Benj is joined by Victoria Arlen (ESPN Host, Author and Olympic Champion) in his happy place, the home his grandparents built decades ago in Connecticut. Chatting on the deck behind the house above a beautiful New England cove, the two share a conversation about their unique personal health challenges, the landscape of recovering both physically and mentally, and then moving forward with their lives. All through the lens of longstanding friendship and mutual respect.

programme.title: Goatman
programme.desc: A news reporter and her crew investigating the legend of "Goatman" in a dense forest find themselves in danger, getting a bigger story than any of them could imagine...

programme.title: Demonic Plastic Surgeon, MD
programme.desc: At an elderly peoples home, a demonic plastic surgeon has been summoned. And soon, they will all be due a make over...

programme.title: Python Island
programme.desc: A group of people searching for a magical tree in a mysterious jungle, find they are not alone. Something is watching them, waiting for the perfect moment to strike...

programme.title: Ouija Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: Strange happenings occur to some friends before a birthday party in a large warehouse. Two of them find an old spirit board and they decide to contact the dead victim former tenants...

programme.title: Dead End Demon (aka Dead End 2)
programme.desc: It has been almost 2 years since the small town of Santa Carla had suffered in the hands of the raging maniac, Cameron Crowe. Legend around town had it as that he may have been burnt in a fire he started...

programme.title: Dinosaur Hotel 2
programme.desc: Surviving contestants are reunited in the ultimate game to win 10 million dollars. Only one contestant will survive and claim the prize as the others fall to the dinosaurs...

programme.title: The Leprechaun's Game
programme.desc: After a bunch of thieves are sent out to hunt for urban legends by a wealthy man intending to open a museum full of mythical creatures. Soon, the thieves will learn the legend of a Leprechaun...

programme.title: The Body Tree
programme.desc: When a group of Americans travels to Russian Siberia to honor the memory of their murdered friend, they uncover a plot that threatens all their lives...

programme.title: Scarecrow's Revenge
programme.desc: A Viking Warrioress must step up when a heathen, banished from her village gives up his mortal soul in exchange for the near indestructible form of a demonic Scarecrow. As warriors fall to the vengeful Scarecrow, it's down to Greta to save her village from annihilation...

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: A supernatural stalker pursues a super model to steal her soul with his demonic camera...

programme.title: The Mermaid's Curse
programme.desc: A young man falls in love with a seductive, sultry, young woman he meets on the beach. The more he falls for her, the more he will learn the dangers of falling in love with a siren...

programme.title: Ditch Day
programme.desc: Jenny Bilson, a high school senior, is the perfect student, a wonderful daughter to a veteran police detective and an all American Dream. But the one mistake she is unaware of making is about to haunt her in a very violent way, as her past returns for revenge...

programme.title: American Beast (aka Beast of Prey)
programme.desc: After finding an old storage locker filled with his family's history, James Erikson begins a journey to discover the truth behind a mysterious piece of land in the small town of Solitude...

programme.title: Die In One Day
programme.desc: After a failed marriage, Richard is in search of his daughter Mindy. He meets Sasha, an aspiring actress who promises to help him. But the hope to get some quick cash by performing in a 24 hours play soon turns out to be a bloody game...

programme.title: The Midnight Man
programme.desc: Hoping to fix their dysfunctional marriage, a couple travels to an isolated mountain cabin to work out their problems - but the one problem they didn't anticipate is the maniac trying to kill them...

programme.title: Alp
programme.desc: After a traumatic experience, Chris comes home to confront his past. but soon finds himself prey to a Demon who taunts him through sleep paralysis...

programme.title: Camp Massacre
programme.desc: Ten obese men appear on a competitive reality show geared toward weight-loss. As contestants disappear in the night it becomes apparent that a killer is on the loose...

programme.title: Creature in the Dark
programme.desc: After strange creatures arrive, a husband waiting for the return of his wife, must adjust to being sole caretaker of his young daughter, while dealing with what is in his basement...

programme.title: Baby Doll
programme.desc: A group of student in vacation find themselves in a house where strange rituals were performed. The sudden finding of a doll bring the group on a downward spiral...

programme.title: Blue Hour
programme.desc: Olivia Brandreth was nine years old when her father disappeared. Twenty five years later, she has returned to her childhood home to finally get closure in an unrelenting attempt to set the record straight...

programme.title: The Elevator (ITN)
programme.desc: A reporter discovers all is not as it seems at an infamous hotel...

programme.title: Horror High 2020 Tyler J. Case
programme.desc: A monster lurks around a high school in the hypnotized town of Willow Hills and picks off tardy students one by one. Now it is up to an unlikely group of teens to put an end to the terror that has plagued many...

programme.title: Lake Terror
programme.desc: Remington has escaped the evil cabin but now the evil continues to follow him, wreaking havoc wherever he goes. Meanwhile, Chloe and Revel look for a missing sister that went to the evil cabin in the previous installment. The two meet Vincent, a failing TV host, to help psychically contact the missing sister. That's when a gunshot rings out in the night and the three meet Remington. Now they all must battle for their lives against the evil that pursues Remington to once and for all lock the evil away for good...

programme.title: Jack and Jill: The Hills of Hell
programme.desc: After searching for her missing daughter, a lady and her search party discover the legend behind the murderous pair of Jack and Jill...

programme.title: Village of the Vampire
programme.desc: Rebecca is searching for her sister, a young journalist who went missing while investigating a series of unfortunate events. The trail leads her to Timere, a remote place far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life, where amidst the tight lipped silence of the town's inhabitants there's an ever growing fear of dark forces at work and no-one dares to leave their home at night. Here Rebecca meets an extravagant writer, the church warden of the town and above all Caleb, a charming, rich and elegant man whose dark gaze hides a chilling secret. It's in this town, where time appears to move between the shadows and danger lurks around every corner that Rebecca learns of the terrible truth and the battle between good and evil begins...

programme.title: Clown Motel
programme.desc: Clown Motel follows a group of ghost hunters, coming from an old ghost town and a bachelorette party, returning home from Las Vegas. When the groups meet up, by mistake, they're left to discover if the motel is really abandoned and haunted by the souls, of the clowns, that once lived there...

programme.title: Scott and Amanda - House Poor
programme.desc: Scott and Amanda - House Poor

programme.title: The Wedding Special
programme.desc: Til Debt Do Us Part

programme.title: Hotel Dinosaurio
programme.desc: Sienna está desesperada por ganar un gran premio en metálico en un concurso secreto clandestino, pero los dinosaurios comienzan a cazarla para entretenimiento de los ricos y adinerados. ¿Podrá ser la última en sobrevivir a la horrible noche para ganar el premio?

programme.title: Kecksburg
programme.desc: Un reportero investiga un misterioso accidente y descubre algo más que un objeto, sino una enorme conspiración gubernamental. Inspirada en los hechos reales del 9 de diciembre de 1965 y en uno de los incidentes OVNI más misteriosos de Estados Unidos...

programme.title: El Culto de Humpty Dumpty
programme.desc: Un grupo de adolescentes con problemas y su maestra deben luchar por sobrevivir después de descubrir que una secta ha devuelto la vida a Humpty Dumpty, un muñeco asesino, y lo ha liberado en el campamento en el que se encuentran...

programme.title: El Bosque del Diablo
programme.desc: Rachel y su equipo de cineastas viajan a Transilvania, Rumania, para documentar los fenómenos paranormales en el bosque de Hoia-Baciu...

programme.title: Mi Sangriento Cumpleaños
programme.desc: Tras un terrible trauma en su cumpleaños, Emma decide no volver a celebrarlo. Pero al cumplir 21, una amiga rompe el ritual con una fiesta sorpresa, sin percatarse del despertar de los horrores que durante años han estado acechando en la oscuridad...

programme.title: La Feria del Diablo
programme.desc: Protagonizada por Justin Duncan, Gerald Crum, Mercedes Peterson y John Charles Dickson. Las estrellas de dos series de televisión paranormales, rivales y enfrentadas, convergen en un parque de atracciones embrujado y abandonado que termina siendo el epicentro del infierno. Ahora están todos atrapados en una guerra sin cuartel contra el mal puro...

programme.title: Naufragio
programme.desc: Mientras transportaba un paquete importante, una joven sufre un accidente de coche en medio de la nada, dejándola atrapada debajo del coche. Poco a poco, se da cuenta de que no solo unos hombres muy malvados la persiguen para recuperar el objeto que transporta, sino que algo muy peligroso la acecha desde las profundidades del bosque...

programme.title: El Juego del Duende
programme.desc: Después de que un hombre adinerado envía a un grupo de ladrones a buscar leyendas urbanas con la intención de abrir un museo lleno de criaturas míticas, pronto descubrirán la leyenda de un duende...

programme.title: Verano Sangriento
programme.desc: Cuatro jóvenes llegan a Mallorca para disfrutar de unas idílicas vacaciones de verano, pero adentrándose en los lugares más inhóspitos de la isla comenzarán un viaje infernal...

programme.title: Juicios de Brujas
programme.desc: Dos realizadores de documentales y un ex policía investigan la desaparición de una niña que se rumorea que fue secuestrada por una bruja en los bosques encantados de Connecticut...

programme.title: Habitación Ouija
programme.desc: Una mujer agorafóbica con autismo comienza a invocar espíritus para que sean sus amigos mientras su hermano/cuidador está ausente durante el día, pero cuanto más tiempo pasa con los espíritus, más claro se vuelve que no son tan amigables después de todo...

programme.title: Serpiente
programme.desc: El equipo de construcción desarrolló a ciegas la isla desconocida, lo que alertó a las dos feroces criaturas de la isla para que fueran destruidas...

programme.title: Recuérdame
programme.desc: Rose despierta en una casa desconocida tras un grave accidente de coche, con pérdida de memoria y sin poder caminar. Su madre y su novio están allí para ayudarla. Rose quiere reconstruir su vida antes del accidente. No todo es lo que parece...

programme.title: La Maldición de la Sirena
programme.desc: Un joven se enamora de una joven seductora y sensual que conoce en la playa. Cuanto más se enamora de ella, más aprende los peligros de enamorarse de una sirena...

programme.title: Aldea del Vampiro
programme.desc: Rebecca busca a su hermana, una joven periodista desaparecida mientras investigaba una serie de desafortunados sucesos. El rastro la conduce a Timere, un lugar remoto alejado del ajetreo de la vida cotidiana, donde entre el hermético silencio de los habitantes del pueblo crece el temor a que actúen fuerzas oscuras y nadie se atreve a salir de casa por la noche. Aquí Rebecca conoce a un extravagante escritor, al guardián de la iglesia del pueblo y, sobre todo, a Caleb, un hombre encantador, rico y elegante cuya oscura mirada esconde un escalofriante secreto. Es en este pueblo, donde el tiempo parece moverse entre las sombras y el peligro acecha en cada esquina, donde Rebecca se entera de la terrible verdad y comienza la batalla entre el bien y el mal...

programme.title: Día del Abandono
programme.desc: Jenny Bilson, una estudiante de último curso de instituto, es la estudiante perfecta, la maravillosa hija de un veterano detective de policía y todo un sueño americano. Pero el único error que no es consciente de haber cometido está a punto de perseguirla de una forma muy violenta, cuando su pasado regresa en busca de venganza...

programme.title: Isla Pitón
programme.desc: Un grupo de personas que buscan un árbol mágico en una selva misteriosa descubren que no están solos. Algo los observa, esperando el momento perfecto para atacar...

programme.title: Jack y Jill: Las Colinas del Infierno
programme.desc: Tras buscar a su hija desaparecida, una dama y su grupo de búsqueda descubren la leyenda que se esconde tras la pareja asesina de Jack y Jill...

programme.title: Ouija: Reunión Mortal
programme.desc: Sucesos extraños les ocurren a unos amigos antes de una fiesta de cumpleaños en un gran almacén. Dos de ellos encuentran un viejo tablero de espiritismo y deciden contactar con los antiguos inquilinos de la víctima fallecida...

programme.title: El Resurgir de la Momia
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de arqueología despierta a una momia ancestral. Tras quedar atrapados en un bucle temporal, la única forma de escapar es derrotarla. A medida que aumenta el número de cadáveres, parece que la Momia debe recolectar las almas de quienes la despertaron para poder caminar sobre la tierra, para siempre...

programme.title: Jack y Jill 3
programme.desc: 10 años después de los últimos asesinatos atroces en la colina, Jack y Jill están de regreso para masacrar al elenco y al equipo de un programa de Internet en vivo que busca descubrir los secretos de la leyenda...

programme.title: El Demonio Interior
programme.desc: Años después de salir de la cárcel, Sam Parsons intenta rehacer su vida con su mujer Courtney y su hija Harper. Trabaja duro para mantener a su familia y permitirse una bonita casa en su tranquilo barrio de las afueras. Cuando empiezan a ocurrir sucesos sobrenaturales en la casa, Sam teme por la seguridad de su mujer y su hija. Cuando los sucesos se convierten en ataques, Sam contrata a Corbin Carlysle y a su equipo de cazafantasmas conocido como «The Ghost Killers», para que le ayuden a luchar contra la entidad oscura que acecha en las sombras de su casa. Cuando las cosas empiezan a complicarse y queda claro que esta entidad es mucho más peligrosa que el típico fantasma, surgen complicaciones cuando Corbin y su equipo se centran más en la fama y la fortuna. Para ganar esta lucha Sam debe luchar contra sus propios demonios interiores y volver a su violento pasado. Para salvar a sus seres queridos, un Demonio debe enfrentarse a un Demonio.

programme.title: Portal de Monstruos de H.P. Lovecraft
programme.desc: Una secta está a punto de despertar a la criatura más temida de H.P. Lovecraft...

programme.title: Newshour

programme.title: Fault Lines
programme.desc: Fault Lines takes you beyond the headlines and holds the powerful to account as we examine the role of the US in the world.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna. En el campo, su familia está padeciendo una gran sequía. Su padre Ernesto, lo recibe a punta de pistola mientras que su perro Arón lo protege imponiéndose amenazante contra su padre. Ernesto decide, en contra de la voluntad de su hijo, sacrificar al perro familiar que se ha vuelto cimarrón. Arón, el perro sacrificado, emerge de su tumba y sus fantasmagóricas apariciones amenazan la cordura de Ernesto y sacuden los cimientos de la familia, que queda a merced de sus impulsos salvajes.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas. El espectador busca una barandilla a la que agarrarse, pero sólo encuentra cuchillos. La carrera artística de Sonia, una joven actriz de teatro, empieza a despegar al tiempo que intenta mantener a flote la relación sentimental que la une a Óscar, casado, a su vez, con la hija de un poderoso empresario. Por otro lado la policía investiga los crímenes de un asesino en serie que envía fotografías comprometidas a sus víctimas antes de acabar con ellas. Sonia acaba de recibir una de esas fotografías...Un asesino en serie del que tan solo vemos sus manos enfundadas en unos guantes de cuero, las pistas falsas, los falsos culpables, gestos y detalles que pasan prácticamente inadvertidos pero que acabaran siendo cruciales, haciendo partícipes a los espectadores del juego, el trauma infantil que sobrevuela constantemente la trama, la pareja de policías que siempre van un paso por detrás del asesino

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: La Mujer que Hablaba con Los Muertos
programme.desc: Es un film de Terror. Cuando Elena Castaño era una niña, tenía un don: era capaz de comunicarse con los espíritus de los muertos... pero esa capacidad desapareció al crecer. Ahora, Elena y su hermana Úrsula viven de las rentas del pasado, organizando falsas sesiones de espiritismo en las que embaucan a los incautos. Elena, harta de esa vida, ha decidido que esta noche celebrará su última sesión. Todo está dispuesto, solo que hay un invitado de más... un invitado al que nadie esperaba. A la hora de afrontar la historia, hemos tenido en cuenta miles de filias: desde los cuentos de fantasmas de M.R. James hasta "Diez Negritos”, de Agatha Christie, pasando por “Posesión Infernal”, “La Trama” (la de Hitchcock, claro) o “En Bandeja de Plata”, de Billy Wilder. La idea era hacer un largometraje con el que la gente se divierta pasando miedo. Que se rían justo antes de saltar del susto, para después volver a reírse.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Amateur
programme.desc: Martín, es un editor que trabaja en un canal de televisión cuyo dueño es el señor Battaglia. Martín se está separando y no tiene donde dormir, por lo que este hombre le ofrece quedarse en uno de sus departamentos en el centro de la cuidad. A la vez a este joven le encomiendan ir al archivo del canal a encontrar una película, pero en dicho lugar todo está desordenado y sin catalogar. A partir de esto, se lleva muchos videos a su nuevo hogar para revisarlos, y entre ellos encuentra uno de tinte erótico que protagoniza una mujer, que luego le será presentada como su vecina Isabel, y esposa de Battaglia. Martín no puede sacarse la imagen de su mente.

programme.title: Catemaco: Magia y Misterio
programme.desc: Una familia normal va de vacaciones a Catemaco, Michoacan un pueblo famoso y pintoresco en Mexico. Todo marcha bien hasta que son atacados por criminales, el padre sobrevive, y con ayuda del brujo mayor del pueblo cobra venganza.

programme.title: Entre Brujas y Nahuales
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Tulancingo Hidalgo, Acatlán y San Dionicio la gente anda muy asustada, pues se rumora que están ocurriendo sucesos fuera de lo normal, tal como desaparición de niños de quienes se han encontrado cuerpos sin sangre, dicen que son las brujas, porque han visto bolas de fuego que aparecen y desaparecen, pero nadie sabe la verdad lo que esta pasando y existe mucho miedo en la población de la región.

programme.title: El Juego del Sexo
programme.desc: Un alienígena cambiante procedente del espacio exterior causa estragos en un pequeño pueblo rural del suroeste de Estados Unidos, cerca del legendario Área 51 de fama ovni. Estos extraterrestres son una raza devoradora de cerebros a quienes les encanta decapitar y comerse a los humanos. Están entre nosotros y lo han estado durante millones de años.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento. Una historia no previsible que juega al despiste, por lo que, hay que esperar hasta el final para saber lo que está pasando la protagonista.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre. Mateo y su esposa corren por sus vidas entre las desoladas montañas buscando sobrevivir al ataque de estos caníbales al final sobrevivirá el más fuerte

programme.title: Black Tax S3
programme.desc: Comedy - Thuli, a 35-year-old real estate agent in Johannesburg, juggles her demanding job, single-parenting her daughter and cousin's son, and supporting her parents and brother, all while managing the pressures of Black Tax. Deserted by her baby daddy at 16, Thuli's life is a chaotic mix of family expectations, a man-child boss, and a non-existent love life.

programme.title: Black Tax S3
programme.desc: Comedy - Thuli, a 35-year-old real estate agent in Johannesburg, juggles her demanding job, single-parenting her daughter and cousin's son, and supporting her parents and brother, all while managing the pressures of Black Tax. Deserted by her baby daddy at 16, Thuli's life is a chaotic mix of family expectations, a man-child boss, and a non-existent love life.

programme.title: Patient 4318
programme.desc: Patient 4318 is a film about a young woman "Rachel" who arrives at Isaiah's private home clinic for a special treatment that helps her delete unwanted memories. She then goes on a surreal journey into her own psyche.

programme.title: Maniac State
programme.desc: No Description

programme.title: Saneliso
programme.desc: Short Film - A Chicago pool-hall owner grapples with the legacy of her communal establishment and beloved son.

programme.title: Mary's Room
programme.desc: Victoria is a student nurse who experiences her first patient death. This makes her rethink her dream of becoming a nurse. Only when she meets one more patient do things change.

programme.title: Redemption Road: The Story of Dr. Yusef Bunchy Shakur
programme.desc: Redemption Road chronicles the journey of Dr. Yusef Bunchy Shakur from gang member who was raised by his Black single mother in a deindustrialized Black Detroit in the 1980s to community leader. Dr. Shakur’s coming-of-age in Amerikkka story explores resilience and transformation while grappling with the harsh realities of violence, incarceration, systemic racism, sexism, and gentrification through personal interviews, photographs, and thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: Just Doing My Job
programme.desc: Documentary - Hear from professionals in the UK music industry, primarily focusing on the challenges and dangers they face in their work environment. It highlights incidents of workplace violence, theft, and even physical harm while on the job. These stories underscore the prevalence of violence in certain work settings, particularly in the music industry, where interactions with gang members and other potentially dangerous individuals are common. Is there a need for industry-wide changes to protect workers?

programme.title: The Kitara Chronicles
programme.desc: During the era of the Batembuzi (demi gods).At the climax of King Bukuku's ruthless reign, Buule a young boy trying to rescue Nangonzi the love of her life who had been taken captive by king Bukuku helps Ndahura the last descent of Isaza grandson of Ruhanga to regain his rightful throne.

programme.title: Envious & Jealousy
programme.desc: It's not an easy time in the suburbs of London, as Josiah and his friends deal with the difficulties and emotions of everyday life.

programme.title: Small Blacks S1
programme.desc: Sport - Fun and educational, Small Blacks TV was a staple of Sunday morning TV in New Zealand for almost a decade. Featuring your favourite players like you've never seen them before, and special friends like Rugger, Webb and Alice, Small Blacks TV will entertain young and old alike.

programme.title: Slay Storiez
programme.desc: Chat show - Slay Storiez is broadcast concerned with addressing issues of the LGBTQIA+ community by spotlighting inspiring individuals and initiatives, championing diversity in their own unique way, while slaying in their lane. The show will shine a light on ignored, forgotten and in some cases erased (hi)stories, whilst making space for inclusive narratives that challenge stereotypes and increase visibility.

programme.title: Shugyo Invitational Episode 7
programme.desc: Episode 7 features the Final match between Max Rohskopf and Nathan Orchard.

programme.title: Armbars with Brandon Mccaghren
programme.desc: Brandon Mccaghren covers details on attacking, finishing and escaping armbars.

programme.title: Not The Bmac Show Episode 9 - The Cruel Tutalage of Bmac
programme.desc: Brandon shows back escapes and promotes one of his students. One of Brandon's students Will begins his training to defeat his step brother at this year's Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Mark of the Wolves Live-Action
programme.desc: Rogue Origin Films created a short film set in the Fatal Fury/King of Fighters universe. We follow the story of Rock Howard as he tells his mentor and the man that killed his father, Terry Bogard, that he's going to participate in the King of Fighters tournament against Terry's wishes.

programme.title: CPI Podcast - Ian "The Hurricane" Heinisch
programme.desc:
In this episode, Scott Nelson and Ed Clay interview Ian "The Hurricane" Heinisch. This UFC fighter recounts his pre-UFC days of drug addiction, incarceration and what he found in prison that eventually saved his life and gave him the opportunities he needed to become the UFC Icon he is today.
Ian first came down to visit the Cellular Performance Institute after suffering a head injury he sustained during training which spiraled into a series of debilitating symptoms that nearly ruined his entire life. After working with a neurologist in Denver and visiting CPI for Stem Cell treatment his testimony speaks for itself.

programme.title: PGF Season 2 Week 8
programme.desc: No points. No judges. No Overtimes. Professional Grappling Federation is a Submission Only grappling league based in Decatur AL and is the brainchild of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu Black Belt Brandon Mccaghren.

programme.title: Guard Passing with 'Buchecha'
programme.desc: Revisit the IBJJF Worlds 2012 Open Class Final and watch 'Buchecha' teach some guard passes.

programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.title: 10pQ 18 - Champion Derek Rayfield
programme.desc: A look back at 10pQ 18 champion Derek Rayfield's competition career.

programme.title: MTS 209- Top Half Passing with Danny Gutierrez
programme.desc: MTS 209- Top Half Passing with Danny Gutierrez

programme.title: Dean Lister - Why Would You ignore 50% Of The Human Body?
programme.desc: In this video, Dean talks about when he first started using leg locks effectively in competition and submitting some of the biggest names in the sport. Plus, the 2012 Heavy Weight World Championships; Rodolfo Vieira vs Xande Ribeiro.

programme.title: Wrestling in ADCC - The Evolution of Wrestling, Jiu Jitsu and No Gi Grappling
programme.desc: Some of the greatest grapplers ever give their opinion on how important wrestling is for No Gi grappling and specifically ADCC. Plus, Joe Rogan and Eddie Bravo recap ADCC 2013.

programme.title: CPI Podcast - Ian "The Hurricane" Heinisch
programme.desc:
In this episode, Scott Nelson and Ed Clay interview Ian "The Hurricane" Heinisch. This UFC fighter recounts his pre-UFC days of drug addiction, incarceration and what he found in prison that eventually saved his life and gave him the opportunities he needed to become the UFC Icon he is today.

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: 10th Planet Team Duel - 10pTD Blue Belts 2022

programme.desc: Keelan Lawyer teaches wrestling for BJJ. Wrestling is quickly becoming an elemental pillar in leveling up your Jiu Jitsu Game. Brandon McCaghren shows off custom made mats, shares a few tips when making your own from 10th Planet Decatur.

programme.title: Stuart Cooper Films - The Craig Jones Story
programme.desc:
A short documentary telling the story of Craig Jones' sudden rise to success after his upset victory over Leandro Lo at ADCC 2017. After his breakout performance at ADCC, Craig went on to beat many more big names such as Jake Shields In Polaris, and made it to the finals of EBI, where he had a close finals match against Gordon Ryan. Since then Craig has competed in some of the biggest tournaments in the world and his life has changed dramatically. In this film we see that it wasn't always an easy road for him.
Director Stuart Cooper

programme.title: CPI - Sean O'Malley Recovers with Stem Cells
programme.desc: Anthony Kadel and Michael Plaster go to The Cellular Performance Institute in Tijuana, Mexico to cover the UFC's #1 ranked Bantamweight, "Suga" Sean O'Malley and his Coach Tim Welch. programme.title: CPI Podcast - Sean O'Malley & Tim Welch
programme.desc: CPI Stem Cell Co-Founder Scotty Nelson hosts episode 4 of The CPI Podcast with UFC all-star "Suga" Sean O'Malley and Tim Welch, both flying out from Phoenix, AZ for treatment at @CPIStemCells Sean came down to get stem cell injections in a knee that had been bothering him for years and Tim opted for shoulder injections and a full-body stem cell IV. These treatments have been changing the way combat athletes heal & recover and we are happy to have been able to serve these awesome guys!

programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.title: CPI Podcast - Sean O'Malley & Tim Welch
programme.desc: CPI Stem Cell Co-Founder Scotty Nelson hosts episode 4 of The CPI Podcast with UFC all-star "Suga" Sean O'Malley and Tim Welch, both flying out from Phoenix, AZ for treatment at @CPIStemCells Sean came down to get stem cell injections in a knee that had been bothering him for years and Tim opted for shoulder injections and a full-body stem cell IV. These treatments have been changing the way combat athletes heal & recover and we are happy to have been able to serve these awesome guys!

programme.title: 10pQ 19 - The Middleweights
programme.desc: A 16-man jiu jitsu tournament. Eddie Bravo has invited warriors from the top moons in the 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu system for a qualifier tournament at the Headquarters in Downtown Los Angeles. The winner will go on to compete on the big stage at Combat Jiu Jitsu Worlds

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - 20 Years in Orbit
programme.desc: Discover the pivotal moments that defined 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu's journey, a revolutionary evolution to the art of Jiu Jitsu that forever changed the landscape of martial arts that continues to shape the world of grappling. Join us as we celebrate this momentous anniversary, paying homage to the visionaries and pioneers who propelled this art form to new heights. Don't miss this must-watch documentary that will leave you inspired and in awe of the remarkable journey of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: American Grappling - St. Louis
programme.desc: On this episode of American Grappling, the Qualifiers for 2024 have officially started ! This episode we see what talent the midwest has to offer with the Qualifiers being hosted in St Louis. Experience the city, the people and of course grappling as the USA Grappling team begin to build their new team for the World Championships. Directed, shot and edited by Anthony Kadel Produced by The Grappling Network

programme.title: American Grappling Podcast- Ft. Dr. Ivan Rascon Aguilar
programme.desc: In this Episode of the AGF Podcast, Brandon Quick interviews Gastroenterologist Ivan Rascon - Aguilar, MD about the health benefits of the Carnivore Diet, how its changed Brandon’s life and how Dr. Rascon - Aguilar is helping hundreds reverse preventable diseases and how a dietary and lifestyle change can improve wellness and athletic performance. Keep an eye out for more American Grappling Federation content here on The Grappling Network.

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grapplers Quest West Coast
programme.desc: Grapplers Quest was founded in 1996 and began the submission grappling fever throughout the martial arts world and set Grapplers Quest as the premiere submission grappling event. Check out these old school No Gi matches featuring UFC Champion B.J. Penn taking on Mike Cardoso- ADCC U.S. Trials Champion. Pioneering athletes like Marc Laimon, Dean Lister, Jeff ""Snowman"" Monson, Chris Brennan, Tony Desouza, Alexandre Dantas, Homer Moore, Alberto Crane, J.D. Penn, Garth Taylor and Sean Spangler. Don't miss the event that started a legacy in the sport of submission grappling and revoltionized ground fighting in the martial arts world."

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grappling All-Stars
programme.desc: Grappling All Stars is a collection of the world's best grapplers in action on the mat from the OTM archives. Featuring; Renner Gracie, BJ Penn, Diego Sanchez, Jeff Glover, Dean Lister, and many more!

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Submissions 101 Chapter 2
programme.desc: Submissions 101 Chapter 2 features the top grapplers showing you their best setups and submissions. A new feature in this sequel includes submissions broken down into categories which include: arm attacks, chokes, leg attacks, triangles, and other attacks. These old school matches are a great learning tool for anyone beginning their submission training or advanced grapplers looking to add new tools to their game. 101 Submissions Chapter 2 includes over 1 year of competition footage from around the world compressed into 48 minutes of intense action from the greatest events in the globe.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 6
programme.desc: This Episode features technique breakdowns of Ryan Hall, Kron Gracie, Jeremiah Vance, Cora Sek, and Jon 'Thor' Blank.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes breakdowns of Clark Gracie's and Baret Yoshida's Crucifixes, Nathan Orchard's signature move, The Dead Orchard and Marcelo Garcia's arm drag.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 8
programme.desc: This Episode breaks down the double buggy choke from 10pQ 19, Geo Martinez's twister, Genki Sudo's flying triangle, and Tarik Hopstock's Tarikoplata.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode breaks down Keenan Cornelius' Reverse Omoplata, Craig Jones' Inside Sankaku, Lachlan Giles' heel hook attacks and Grace “The Silent Assassin” Gundrum.

programme.title: Black Sheep Boxing with Zack Moore - 10pATX
programme.desc: After struggling with addiction himself, Jeff Meadows opened Black Sheep Boxing along with his friend Sky Wood with the purpose of giving recovering addicts an opportunity to turn their lives around. Join 10th Planet ATX's Zack Moore as he visits Black Sheep Boxing to learn the art of boxing.

programme.title: CPI Podcast - Sean O'Malley & Tim Welch
programme.desc: CPI Stem Cell Co-Founder Scotty Nelson hosts episode 4 of The CPI Podcast with UFC all-star "Suga" Sean O'Malley and Tim Welch, both flying out from Phoenix, AZ for treatment at @CPIStemCells Sean came down to get stem cell injections in a knee that had been bothering him for years and Tim opted for shoulder injections and a full-body stem cell IV. These treatments have been changing the way combat athletes heal & recover and we are happy to have been able to serve these awesome guys!

programme.title: Mat Made - Columbia
programme.desc: Kenny visits Columbia, South Carolina to meet 3x Jiu Jitsu World Champion - Guybson Sa

Witness the Grand Royale where the worlds best teams go at it for a chance to win $10000 and bragging rights before the Pro Breaking Tour begins."

programme.title: ADCC Opens Dallas- Journey from Newcomer to Champion
programme.desc: You’re watching a TGN original on The ADCC 2023 Dallas Opens. Check out 17 year old phenom Michael Sainz and returning athletes like Luke Griffith & Giancarlo Bodoni. We take a deeper look at these competitors mindset going into the Opens, what they expect with the ADCC rule set and how they’re preparing for Trials.

programme.title: Rubber Guard 101

programme.title: USA Grappling – 2023 World Team Recap
programme.desc: Character Profile - Recap of Athletes competing in 2023 UWW World Championship in Poland. Ft. Brady Wicklund, Alex Enriquez, Kevin Crane, Christina Hansen, Gavin Teasdale, Guiseppe Lumanna, John Hanson, Emily Hauser, Mario Gonzalez, Paul Ardila, Sergio Ardila, Sheliah Lindsey, Tanner Cahill, and Tara White.

programme.title: Tap Out Challenge - Oceanside
programme.desc: On October 15th at the picturesque Oceanside, CA, Charles Rials embarked on an incredible BJJ journey, challenging strangers from all walks of life to tap me out and claim $100. But there was a twist that none of them saw coming! Win or Lose, they got the MONEY!!! What they all shared was the courage to step up, the passion to engage, and the heart of a warrior. This video isn't just about BJJ or the challenge — it's a celebration of the human spirit, perseverance, and the unexpected twists that life (and jiu jitsu) can throw our way. Join Charles in this heartwarming, adrenaline-pumping journey where every challenge was met with respect, and every challenger was met with a surprise. Whether you're a BJJ enthusiast or someone who loves to witness genuine human moments, this video has something special for you.

programme.title: 10pQ 19 - The Middleweights
programme.desc: A 16-man jiu jitsu tournament. Eddie Bravo has invited warriors from the top moons in the 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu system for a qualifier tournament at the Headquarters in Downtown Los Angeles. The winner will go on to compete on the big stage at Combat Jiu Jitsu Worlds

programme.title: 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu - 20 Years in Orbit
programme.desc: Discover the pivotal moments that defined 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu's journey, a revolutionary evolution to the art of Jiu Jitsu that forever changed the landscape of martial arts that continues to shape the world of grappling. Join us as we celebrate this momentous anniversary, paying homage to the visionaries and pioneers who propelled this art form to new heights. Don't miss this must-watch documentary that will leave you inspired and in awe of the remarkable journey of 10th Planet Jiu Jitsu.

programme.title: American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: American Grappling - St. Louis
programme.desc: On this episode of American Grappling, the Qualifiers for 2024 have officially started ! This episode we see what talent the midwest has to offer with the Qualifiers being hosted in St Louis. Experience the city, the people and of course grappling as the USA Grappling team begin to build their new team for the World Championships. Directed, shot and edited by Anthony Kadel Produced by The Grappling Network

programme.title: American Grappling Podcast- Ft. Dr. Ivan Rascon Aguilar
programme.desc: In this Episode of the AGF Podcast, Brandon Quick interviews Gastroenterologist Ivan Rascon - Aguilar, MD about the health benefits of the Carnivore Diet, how its changed Brandon’s life and how Dr. Rascon - Aguilar is helping hundreds reverse preventable diseases and how a dietary and lifestyle change can improve wellness and athletic performance. Keep an eye out for more American Grappling Federation content here on The Grappling Network.

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grapplers Quest West Coast
programme.desc: Grapplers Quest was founded in 1996 and began the submission grappling fever throughout the martial arts world and set Grapplers Quest as the premiere submission grappling event. Check out these old school No Gi matches featuring UFC Champion B.J. Penn taking on Mike Cardoso- ADCC U.S. Trials Champion. Pioneering athletes like Marc Laimon, Dean Lister, Jeff ""Snowman"" Monson, Chris Brennan, Tony Desouza, Alexandre Dantas, Homer Moore, Alberto Crane, J.D. Penn, Garth Taylor and Sean Spangler. Don't miss the event that started a legacy in the sport of submission grappling and revoltionized ground fighting in the martial arts world."

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Grappling All-Stars
programme.desc: Grappling All Stars is a collection of the world's best grapplers in action on the mat from the OTM archives. Featuring; Renner Gracie, BJ Penn, Diego Sanchez, Jeff Glover, Dean Lister, and many more!

programme.title: BJJ Classics - Submissions 101 Chapter 2
programme.desc: Submissions 101 Chapter 2 features the top grapplers showing you their best setups and submissions. A new feature in this sequel includes submissions broken down into categories which include: arm attacks, chokes, leg attacks, triangles, and other attacks. These old school matches are a great learning tool for anyone beginning their submission training or advanced grapplers looking to add new tools to their game. 101 Submissions Chapter 2 includes over 1 year of competition footage from around the world compressed into 48 minutes of intense action from the greatest events in the globe.

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 8

programme.title: BJJ Trickster Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode breaks down Keenan Cornelius' Reverse Omoplata, Craig Jones' Inside Sankaku, Lachlan Giles' heel hook attacks and Grace “The Silent Assassin” Gundrum.

programme.title: Stuart Cooper Films - The Craig Jones Story
programme.desc:
A short documentary telling the story of Craig Jones' sudden rise to success after his upset victory over Leandro Lo at ADCC 2017. After his breakout performance at ADCC, Craig went on to beat many more big names such as Jake Shields In Polaris, and made it to the finals of EBI, where he had a close finals match against Gordon Ryan. Since then Craig has competed in some of the biggest tournaments in the world and his life has changed dramatically. In this film we see that it wasn't always an easy road for him.
Director Stuart Cooper
