programme.title: ADCC - Denver Opens
programme.desc: The Opens make their way to the mile high city where the best martial arts from the US look to stake their claim for supremacy as the circuit heats up. In this heart-pounding instalment, we bring you all the action from the epic showdown held in the magnificent city of Denver. Former UFC Strawweight Champion of the World Rose Namajunas known for her exceptional martial arts abilities, Rose is now ready to put her skills to the ultimate test in the realm of grappling. Witness her transition from the cage to the mats, as she grapples her way through some of the most intense matches of her career. ADCC Opens superstar and prodigy 16-year-old phenom, Helena Craver, steps onto the mats to showcase her unparalleled talent. With her sights set on glory, she aims to conquer the teenage, adults, and absolute divisions a feat that has never been done before. In a clash of titans, long time elite grappler Ryan Aitkens, a formidable competitor in his own right, is set to go head-to-head against the multiple-time world champion, Mateus Lutes. Brace yourself for an explosive battle between these two grappling juggernauts, as they leave everything on the mats in pursuit of victory.

programme.title: CPI - Sean O'Malley Recovers with Stem Cells
programme.desc: Anthony Kadel and Michael Plaster go to The Cellular Performance Institute in Tijuana, Mexico to cover the UFC's #1 ranked Bantamweight, "Suga" Sean O'Malley and his Coach Tim Welch. Spend a day with Sean and Tim as they embark on the road to recovery at the premier stem cell hospital. Presented by The Grappling Network.

programme.title: CPI Podcast - Sean O'Malley & Tim Welch
programme.desc: CPI Stem Cell Co-Founder Scotty Nelson hosts episode 4 of The CPI Podcast with UFC all-star "Suga" Sean O'Malley and Tim Welch, both flying out from Phoenix, AZ for treatment at @CPIStemCells Sean came down to get stem cell injections in a knee that had been bothering him for years and Tim opted for shoulder injections and a full-body stem cell IV. These treatments have been changing the way combat athletes heal & recover and we are happy to have been able to serve these awesome guys!

programme.title: American Grappling - Los Angeles
American Grappling - Seattle
programme.desc: American Grappling heads to Seattle, Washington. Coach Morgan heads to the world-famous Pike’s Market and get a taste of the Northwest. Our featured competitor is the black belt Nathan Orchard. Nathan is looking to make Team USA to tick the final box of his career…win a grappling world championship…but he’ll have to get past Eric Spence. Eric has wrestled his whole life and competed on a wrestling US World team. It’s the traditional clash of styles between wrestling and jiujitsu. Find out who’ll end up on top and secure their spot at the world team trials.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 3 World Championships Szeged
programme.desc: Welcome to the Canoe Sprint World Championships 2019 celebrated in Szeged, Hungary! Today there are about 1,200 athletes racing from approximately 98 nations, meaning this is the biggest World Championships canoe sprint racing has ever seen. We're about to witness the fastest paddlers on the planet battle it out for medals, for World Championship glory, and to qualify for their country at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. Enjoy the best moments at Szeged on the 2019 Sprint World Championships.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 1 World Cup Ljubljana
programme.desc: Ljubljana is the chosen scenery for the Slalom World Cup. The slovenian capital will bring the top kayakers who will navigate the whitewater course passing through a series of combination of upstream and downstream gates. The fastest to achieve this will become the champion of the World Cup. Find out now what will happen in Ljubljana in the exciting Slalom World Cup!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we are following the 2019 RSX European Championships. The 2019 RS:X Europeans and Youth European Championships which are being held on the island of Mallorca, Spain, is a record turn out for the RS:X Class with 333 confirmed entries from 43 different nations representing six different continents over five days of racing. This is not a challenge for the class and athletes alone, but also for the local host Club Nautic Arenal.

programme.title: Rolex New York Yacht Invitational Cup - Highlight
programme.desc: Rolex New York Yacht Invitational Cup - Highlight

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5
programme.desc: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 6
programme.desc: Sailing to the Games - Episode 6

programme.title: Gulf of Mexico
programme.desc: Beppe Faresin is an extreme kayaker with a dream: venturing into the Gulf of Mexico on a kayak. In this adventure, he will kayak his way through the Mexican lagoons and swamps to discover the wild nature of this unique country. Faresin is already famous for raising funds for UNICEF while paddling in rivers and oceans all over the world. Now, he faces a new challenge: crossing the Gulf of Mexico by himself. For almost 1500 km, this apparently fearless athlete will discover corners of Mexico otherwise unreachable by land. Follow his challenge navigating through the Gulf and find out what happens along the way.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 6
programme.desc: For its sixth season, the ultra-high performance one design catamarans, once again visited five top venues across the world. Each location selected particularly for its ideal weather conditions - stable winds and flat waters - perfect for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at speeds of over 30 knots. Earlier in 2019, intensive discussions and decisions took place within the teams with many deciding to focus their efforts for the upcoming season, on the GC32 Racing Tour. This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. Amongst them, some of the most well-known professional sailors in the world.

This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. programme.title: New York - Vendée Transatlantic Race
programme.desc: This single-handed yacht race will cross the Northern Atlantic through two symbolic cities: New York and Sables d’Olonne. The departure from the Big Apple represents a cosmopolitan crossroad of influences, as well as the cradle of the IMOCA Class, while the arrival in the Sables d’Olonne means landing in the Old Continent after days or weeks of harsh conditions.After crossing a risky and challenging course straight through the middle of the “iceberg alley”, the skippers will arrive in the heart of the Vendée Globe considered as the “Everest of the Sea”. The Transatlantic race is the final event of the IMOCA Globe Series and it allows racers to build their hard racing miles. It represents a further opportunity to reinforce its image as a marine region, thus it is an awaited event for all those sailors thinking about embarking on the Vendée Globe.Follow their journey from New York to Sables d’Olonne in New York – Vendée Transatlantic Race. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: Gulf of Mexico
programme.desc: Beppe Faresin is an extreme kayaker with a dream: venturing into the Gulf of Mexico on a kayak. In this adventure, he will kayak his way through the Mexican lagoons and swamps to discover the wild nature of this unique country. Faresin is already famous for raising funds for UNICEF while paddling in rivers and oceans all over the world. Now, he faces a new challenge: crossing the Gulf of Mexico by himself. For almost 1500 km, this apparently fearless athlete will discover corners of Mexico otherwise unreachable by land. Follow his challenge navigating through the Gulf and find out what happens along the way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep5 - Kayaking Ireland\'s West Coast
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the Republic of Ireland\'s West Coast and the adventures by kayak and foot along the Wild Atlantic Way.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep6 - Great Family Adventure - Banff and Lake Louise, Canada
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman, Emily Jackson and family try some winter activities on for size in beautiful Banff and Lake Louise, Canada.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Endless Summer In Norfolk
programme.desc: Norfolk: population to just over 240,000 people and neighbour of the Chesapeake Bay is one of the top nautical destination for many enthusiasts in the USA. Holding a strong historical heritage and home to the largest naval base in the world, nautical sports are practiced regularly in this city in Virginia. Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer heads to Virginia to discover Norfolk and what makes it so important in the nautical world. A port city on the Chesapeake Bay, bordering the Atlantic Ocean and countless rivers in its backyard, you just can't get away from the water. Discover some of the incredible 144 miles of coastline in the heart of Virginia with Lucia Metzbauer.Get ready to live an Endless Summer in Norfolk on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Nautical Adventure In A Landlocked Country
programme.desc: Switzerland: home to the Alps and important water competitions like the Bol d’Or Mirabaud, the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Today it becomes the chosen scenario for this Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country. From extreme wakeboarding to canoe polo, we will discover that, despite being located far from the sea, Switzerland has a vibrant nautical scene.Get ready to accompany Nautical Channel’s host, Lucia Metzbauer, as she goes wakeboarding with local Swiss pros, learns about the annual Match Race regatta, tries her hand at Stand-Up-Paddle, and discovers the little known sport of Canoe Polo! This country has much to offer, so don’t miss out on its beautiful scenery that will have you pack your bags to come visit on the first occasion.Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country reminds us that water sports can be practiced even in countries that do not border the ocean. An inland fanta-sea for those nautical intrepids that are looking for ways of widening their horizons. Welcome to the Alps.

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 8
programme.desc: We are sailing through Iraklia, one of the islands that make up the Cyclades in Greece. Our captain Deanna, skipper Giorgio, Dulce and Maria will take a nice swim in the harbour before exploring the island's caves. Are you coming with us?

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 9
programme.desc: Today we say goodbye to our skipper Giorgio, who is leaving us, and welcoming Marcos who will take us to Paros. As we approach the end of our trip, we start getting emotional and recall the best moments of this trip.

Today it becomes the chosen scenario for this Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country. From extreme wakeboarding to canoe polo, we will discover that, despite being located far from the sea, Switzerland has a vibrant nautical scene.Get ready to accompany Nautical Channel’s host, Lucia Metzbauer, as she goes wakeboarding with local Swiss pros, learns about the annual Match Race regatta, tries her hand at Stand-Up-Paddle, and discovers the little known sport of Canoe Polo! This country has much to offer, so don’t miss out on its beautiful scenery that will have you pack your bags to come visit on the first occasion.Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country reminds us that water sports can be practiced even in countries that do not border the ocean. An inland fanta-sea for those nautical intrepids that are looking for ways of widening their horizons. Welcome to the Alps.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5
programme.desc: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 6
programme.desc: Sailing to the Games - Episode 6

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.7 - NOVALJA - RAB
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.7 - NOVALJA - RAB

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 3 World Championships Szeged
programme.desc: Welcome to the Canoe Sprint World Championships 2019 celebrated in Szeged, Hungary! Today there are about 1,200 athletes racing from approximately 98 nations, meaning this is the biggest World Championships canoe sprint racing has ever seen. We're about to witness the fastest paddlers on the planet battle it out for medals, for World Championship glory, and to qualify for their country at the Tokyo 2020 Olympic Games. Enjoy the best moments at Szeged on the 2019 Sprint World Championships.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 1 World Cup Ljubljana
programme.desc: Ljubljana is the chosen scenery for the Slalom World Cup. The slovenian capital will bring the top kayakers who will navigate the whitewater course passing through a series of combination of upstream and downstream gates. The fastest to achieve this will become the champion of the World Cup. Find out now what will happen in Ljubljana in the exciting Slalom World Cup!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 6
programme.desc: For its sixth season, the ultra-high performance one design catamarans, once again visited five top venues across the world. Each location selected particularly for its ideal weather conditions - stable winds and flat waters - perfect for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at speeds of over 30 knots. Earlier in 2019, intensive discussions and decisions took place within the teams with many deciding to focus their efforts for the upcoming season, on the GC32 Racing Tour. This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. Amongst them, some of the most well-known professional sailors in the world.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - GP Spain - Ski
programme.desc: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - GP Spain - Ski

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we move to Great Britain and the Weymouth and Portland National Sailing Academy to follow the Volvo 49er, 49erFX and Nacra 17 European Championship. This will be the first Olympic class racing event to take place in the UK since 2016! Are you coming with us?

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA
programme.desc: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA

programme.title: New York - Vendée Transatlantic Race
programme.desc: This single-handed yacht race will cross the Northern Atlantic through two symbolic cities: New York and Sables d’Olonne. The departure from the Big Apple represents a cosmopolitan crossroad of influences, as well as the cradle of the IMOCA Class, while the arrival in the Sables d’Olonne means landing in the Old Continent after days or weeks of harsh conditions.After crossing a risky and challenging course straight through the middle of the “iceberg alley”, the skippers will arrive in the heart of the Vendée Globe considered as the “Everest of the Sea”. The Transatlantic race is the final event of the IMOCA Globe Series and it allows racers to build their hard racing miles. It represents a further opportunity to reinforce its image as a marine region, thus it is an awaited event for all those sailors thinking about embarking on the Vendée Globe.Follow their journey from New York to Sables d’Olonne in New York – Vendée Transatlantic Race. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep5 - Kayaking Ireland\'s West Coast
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the Republic of Ireland\'s West Coast and the adventures by kayak and foot along the Wild Atlantic Way.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep6 - Great Family Adventure - Banff and Lake Louise, Canada
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman, Emily Jackson and family try some winter activities on for size in beautiful Banff and Lake Louise, Canada.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: Join host Andi van Zyl in South Africa for one of the toughest canoe races in the world! The Dusi Canoe Marathon famously pits competitors against powerful rapids and unpredictable wildlife, and the 2014 edition will feature SUP riders for the first time in the event’s history. Are you ready for all its action? Discover the 2014 Dusi Canoe Marathon on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Szeged
programme.desc: Szeged in Hungary is the third biggest city in the country and the chosen scenery for the Sprints World Cup. Organisers of the ICF canoe sprint moved heaven and earth to prove an international event in the middle of a global pandemic was possible and safe for all participants. As a result, athletes took part in a splendid competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Pau
programme.desc: The Slalom World Cup series of 2020 continue in Pau. In the south of France, just 85km from the Spanish border, the kayakers will challenge themselves to this slalom competition. They want to become the best of the world in this Olympic discipline. Find out now who will be at the podium of the Slalom World Cup in Pau.

programme.title: IQFOiL International Games - Cádiz
programme.desc: More than 150 athletes from 18 different countries competed in Cadiz for one of the most coveted titles of this class: the second stop of the International Circuit of the IQ Foil class. After the meeting in Lanzarote, some of the best windsurfers in the world meet again in Cadiz to compete in the International Games IQ Foil Cadiz. Enjoy the competition in Cadiz!

programme.title: Dragon Boat Club Crews World Championship Ravenna
programme.desc: The IDBF Worlds are coming back to Italy with strength for the first time since 2002. More than 5000 sailors from 27 countries will gather in Ravenna to celebrate the ancient Chinese tradition of dragon boating. The stakes are higher than just winning: it's about proving that this sport can have a cultural impact around the world.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome to the third episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we move to Great Britain and the Weymouth and Portland National Sailing Academy to follow the Volvo 49er, 49erFX and Nacra 17 European Championship. This will be the first Olympic class racing event to take place in the UK since 2016! Are you coming with us?

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.7 - NOVALJA - RAB
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.7 - NOVALJA - RAB

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep5 - Kayaking Ireland\'s West Coast
programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the Republic of Ireland\'s West Coast and the adventures by kayak and foot along the Wild Atlantic Way.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep6 - Great Family Adventure - Banff and Lake Louise, Canada
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman, Emily Jackson and family try some winter activities on for size in beautiful Banff and Lake Louise, Canada.

programme.title: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA
programme.desc: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA

programme.title: New York - Vendée Transatlantic Race
programme.desc: This single-handed yacht race will cross the Northern Atlantic through two symbolic cities: New York and Sables d’Olonne. The departure from the Big Apple represents a cosmopolitan crossroad of influences, as well as the cradle of the IMOCA Class, while the arrival in the Sables d’Olonne means landing in the Old Continent after days or weeks of harsh conditions.After crossing a risky and challenging course straight through the middle of the “iceberg alley”, the skippers will arrive in the heart of the Vendée Globe considered as the “Everest of the Sea”. The Transatlantic race is the final event of the IMOCA Globe Series and it allows racers to build their hard racing miles. It represents a further opportunity to reinforce its image as a marine region, thus it is an awaited event for all those sailors thinking about embarking on the Vendée Globe.Follow their journey from New York to Sables d’Olonne in New York – Vendée Transatlantic Race. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Szeged
programme.desc: Szeged in Hungary is the third biggest city in the country and the chosen scenery for the Sprints World Cup. Organisers of the ICF canoe sprint moved heaven and earth to prove an international event in the middle of a global pandemic was possible and safe for all participants. As a result, athletes took part in a splendid competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Pau
programme.desc: The Slalom World Cup series of 2020 continue in Pau. In the south of France, just 85km from the Spanish border, the kayakers will challenge themselves to this slalom competition. They want to become the best of the world in this Olympic discipline. Find out now who will be at the podium of the Slalom World Cup in Pau.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 6
programme.desc: For its sixth season, the ultra-high performance one design catamarans, once again visited five top venues across the world. Each location selected particularly for its ideal weather conditions - stable winds and flat waters - perfect for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at speeds of over 30 knots. Earlier in 2019, intensive discussions and decisions took place within the teams with many deciding to focus their efforts for the upcoming season, on the GC32 Racing Tour. This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. Amongst them, some of the most well-known professional sailors in the world.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Nautical Adventure In A Landlocked Country
programme.desc: Switzerland: home to the Alps and important water competitions like the Bol d’Or Mirabaud, the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Today it becomes the chosen scenario for this Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country. From extreme wakeboarding to canoe polo, we will discover that, despite being located far from the sea, Switzerland has a vibrant nautical scene.Get ready to accompany Nautical Channel’s host, Lucia Metzbauer, as she goes wakeboarding with local Swiss pros, learns about the annual Match Race regatta, tries her hand at Stand-Up-Paddle, and discovers the little known sport of Canoe Polo! This country has much to offer, so don’t miss out on its beautiful scenery that will have you pack your bags to come visit on the first occasion.Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country reminds us that water sports can be practiced even in countries that do not border the ocean. An inland fanta-sea for those nautical intrepids that are looking for ways of widening their horizons. Welcome to the Alps.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 15
programme.desc: Altamarea has been building dinghies since 2003 and its shipyard is based in Palermo, ranging seven models. Today we get onboard the largest, the Wave 35 GT. Then we move on the Cranchi, one of the largest and advanced yacht manufacturers for the E26 Classic before trying out the Gemini 37 Freestyle, a typical American catamaran.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 16
programme.desc: Today we are in Monte Carlo, and our test voyage on board the Customline 106 starts from here. After trying this boat, we're going to show you something really special: the first hole from Altima. We are talking about the 38 Xscape. Finally, there is a lot of demand for sail boats in America, and we are behind the long queue waiting to get into the new Lagoon 46.

This country has much to offer, so don’t miss out on its beautiful scenery that will have you pack your bags to come visit on the first occasion.Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country reminds us that water sports can be practiced even in countries that do not border the ocean. An inland fanta-sea for those nautical intrepids that are looking for ways of widening their horizons. Welcome to the Alps.

programme.title: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA
programme.desc: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA

programme.title: New York - Vendée Transatlantic Race
programme.desc: This single-handed yacht race will cross the Northern Atlantic through two symbolic cities: New York and Sables d’Olonne. The departure from the Big Apple represents a cosmopolitan crossroad of influences, as well as the cradle of the IMOCA Class, while the arrival in the Sables d’Olonne means landing in the Old Continent after days or weeks of harsh conditions.After crossing a risky and challenging course straight through the middle of the “iceberg alley”, the skippers will arrive in the heart of the Vendée Globe considered as the “Everest of the Sea”. The Transatlantic race is the final event of the IMOCA Globe Series and it allows racers to build their hard racing miles. It represents a further opportunity to reinforce its image as a marine region, thus it is an awaited event for all those sailors thinking about embarking on the Vendée Globe.Follow their journey from New York to Sables d’Olonne in New York – Vendée Transatlantic Race. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 1 - Origin
programme.desc: From under the Golden Gate Bridge down to the Santa Cruz Islands the three friends and their little boat are now heading south. However bad weather is on the horizon and signs that the film and the filmmaker are already thinking about abandoning ship are starting to leak through. After a long night of sea sickness, it’s time to face reality and see who’s going to stick around and who’s going to go.

programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the Republic of Ireland\'s West Coast and the adventures by kayak and foot along the Wild Atlantic Way.

programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman, Emily Jackson and family try some winter activities on for size in beautiful Banff and Lake Louise, Canada.

programme.title: P1 USA UIM Class 1 - Episode 5 St Pete, FL
programme.desc: Reaching the end of the P1 UIM Class 2021 Championship in the USA, racers have made it to the St Pete Powerboat Grand Prix for a grandiose finale. Competing against the clock and against their rivals, they will prove their need for speed is real to win the championship. Be part of the exciting and fast world of powerboat racing in this fifth episode of the P1 USA Championship.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 5 St Pete Downtown, FL
programme.desc: Moving on from the Great Lakes Grand Prix, riders advance to St. Petersburg, Florida, for the last event of the P1 AquaX 2021 Championship. This event involves high-speed watercraft racing action, and competitors face each other against the clock to determine this season's ultimate winner. Start your engines and come race with us!

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: 3 Days
programme.desc: Telegram: SkarlavaIn June 2015 something that changed the history of surfing took place in Nias. For three epic days on the 28th, 29th and 30th some of the heaviest barrels on the planet exploded onto the Indonesian reef. This has resulted in 3 days of surfing madness in Nias, Indonesia as the bravest world surfers dive into the water to battle and catch some of the biggest waves.Featuring world known surfers Luke Dillon, Dave Rastovich, Courtney Conlogue, Anthony Walsh, Damien Healey, Matt Bronley, Justin Bu'ulolo, Alex Bu'ulolo, Jim Burgin, Antoni Dachi, Skeet Durham, Philips, Matt Younis, Rodrigo Sino Leonardo Kessa and more...Don’t miss out on 3 days of pumping waves and heavy barrels that will mesmerise you on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Alacati Windsurf Mecca
programme.desc: Alacati is a town on Turkey’s Cesme Peninsula and for many a Windsurf Mecca. The town is famous for its constant winds and drives the attention of people who like practicing wind sports such as Windsurfing, Kitesurfing, SUP and many more. For years now, the small town is experiencing the impact of windsurfing in their economy, society and lifestyle as it attracts the attention of people worldwide that prefer the Turkish coast to practice water sports.Experience the Alacati Windsurf Mecca that will be sure to blow your mind on Nautical Channel.

Organisers of the ICF canoe sprint moved heaven and earth to prove an international event in the middle of a global pandemic was possible and safe for all participants. As a result, athletes took part in a splendid competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Pau
programme.desc: The Slalom World Cup series of 2020 continue in Pau. In the south of France, just 85km from the Spanish border, the kayakers will challenge themselves to this slalom competition. They want to become the best of the world in this Olympic discipline. Find out now who will be at the podium of the Slalom World Cup in Pau.

programme.desc: Sailing to the Games - Episode 1

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing to the Games - Episode 2

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: Nautical Adventure In A Landlocked Country
programme.desc: Switzerland: home to the Alps and important water competitions like the Bol d’Or Mirabaud, the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Today it becomes the chosen scenario for this Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country. From extreme wakeboarding to canoe polo, we will discover that, despite being located far from the sea, Switzerland has a vibrant nautical scene.Get ready to accompany Nautical Channel’s host, Lucia Metzbauer, as she goes wakeboarding with local Swiss pros, learns about the annual Match Race regatta, tries her hand at Stand-Up-Paddle, and discovers the little known sport of Canoe Polo! This country has much to offer, so don’t miss out on its beautiful scenery that will have you pack your bags to come visit on the first occasion.Nautical Adventure in a Landlocked Country reminds us that water sports can be practiced even in countries that do not border the ocean. An inland fanta-sea for those nautical intrepids that are looking for ways of widening their horizons. Welcome to the Alps.

programme.title: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA
programme.desc: Formula Wing European Championships - Ep.1 - URLA

programme.title: New York - Vendée Transatlantic Race
programme.desc: This single-handed yacht race will cross the Northern Atlantic through two symbolic cities: New York and Sables d’Olonne. The departure from the Big Apple represents a cosmopolitan crossroad of influences, as well as the cradle of the IMOCA Class, while the arrival in the Sables d’Olonne means landing in the Old Continent after days or weeks of harsh conditions.After crossing a risky and challenging course straight through the middle of the “iceberg alley”, the skippers will arrive in the heart of the Vendée Globe considered as the “Everest of the Sea”. The Transatlantic race is the final event of the IMOCA Globe Series and it allows racers to build their hard racing miles. It represents a further opportunity to reinforce its image as a marine region, thus it is an awaited event for all those sailors thinking about embarking on the Vendée Globe.Follow their journey from New York to Sables d’Olonne in New York – Vendée Transatlantic Race. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this month's episode we move to the western edge of Europe and the second largest city of Portugal, Porto. Located alongside the stunning Douro River, Porto is home ot the 2019 Laser Senior European Championships and Open European Trophy with all the top names of the class. Also, new ambitious senior sailors are on their way to the titles.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 2 - Reality
programme.desc: Now closing in on Mexico and having spent nearly a month at sea, the crew are facing some realities they didn’t expect. It’s cold, it’s wet, and its nothing like what they were hoping. Adding to the chaos, Barry is emotionally lost and opens up about what he left behind to go on this trip. As the crew pokes around Catalina Island and down into Mexico a reckoning with what the trip is and what they wanted it to be is on the horizon and with it a new reality of life.

programme.title: PRADA 36th America's Cup - Highlight
programme.desc: The moment everyone was waiting for has arrived: the 36th America’s Cup has started. Postponed a couple of days due to restrictions, it has finally started with a big start. The defender team started the day with an aggressive start and taking the lead, but Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli came to win this competition. What will happen at the end of this day? Watch the highlights of the competition.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep7 - Kayaking Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Ken Whiting kayaks along Northern Ireland\'s Giant\'s Causeway Coast near Derry and Strangford Lough outside Belfast.

programme.title: Inside Vienna - Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports
programme.desc: Welcome to Vienna!Austria’s capital, lying by the Danube River and known for its artistic and intellectual legacy shaped by residents as Mozart, Beethoven or Sigmund Freud amongst others. Vienna is a city known for its tradition, but has also become the scene for modern nautical sports that are shifting the world of water sports.From meeting the Austrian Olympic rowing team to freestyle kayaking and a rendezvous with the local Gondola Club, host Lucia Metzbauer is on a quest to discover the nautical sports and athletes of Vienna. She is set for a challenge as she sails across all the different sport options in the city.Become part of the Vienna scenery and discover the water sports this city has to offer from the side of Lucia Metzbauer, on Inside Vienna – Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports.

programme.title: Meet me in Madeira
programme.desc: Welcome to Madeira!The main island of the volcanic Portuguese archipelago is home to a wide sea life and rich ecosystem. With its subtropical climate, Madeira is a chosen destination for nautical sports enthusiasts that enjoy the paradisiac conditions of the island.From diving to surfing, sailing to coasteering, Madeira offers a wide variety of nautical activities for the avid sportsmen or just the visiting tourist. Join Andi van Zyl on an experience that only this Portuguese archipelago has to offer, from stand-up paddling to wine tasting.Discover the secrets of Madeira and get to know the heart-warming locals of the beautiful archipelago in an exclusive show on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - 2013
programme.desc: Set in the iconic Port Hercules of the Principality of Monaco since 1991, the MYS is the only place to admire, visit and purchase around 125 extraordinary one-off superyachts built by the world’s most respectful shipyards. Experience the luxury, learn what is trending in the yachting world, and see exclusive test runs of this year's hottest yachts!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 1
programme.desc: Our DJ adventure is about to begin! Come with us as we pack our bags and leave for sunny Ibiza in Spain. After dropping our bags we are saying hi to David Guetta before trying out our skills as DJs and finding out how Ibiza's nightlife will surprise us. Join us!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing Deejay continues its journey in Ibiza and the nearing islands to the rhythm of the night! Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to this new season of Jump on Board! Our journey begins in Athens: in the Temple of Poseidon. Ancient travelers used to come here and ask for the favours of the god of the sea before their journey. Let's begin!

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 2
programme.desc: The Aegean Sea is a mythological setting where western culture started from. Along with our two sailors, Zita and Abi, Mia will be mooring in Skyathos, and the girls are already more aware of the journey that lies ahead of them. This will trully be an amazing journey to make them become true sailors. Are you joining us?

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Szeged
programme.desc: Szeged in Hungary is the third biggest city in the country and the chosen scenery for the Sprints World Cup. Organisers of the ICF canoe sprint moved heaven and earth to prove an international event in the middle of a global pandemic was possible and safe for all participants. As a result, athletes took part in a splendid competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom 2 World Cup Pau
programme.desc: The Slalom World Cup series of 2020 continue in Pau. In the south of France, just 85km from the Spanish border, the kayakers will challenge themselves to this slalom competition. They want to become the best of the world in this Olympic discipline. Find out now who will be at the podium of the Slalom World Cup in Pau.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this month's episode we move to the western edge of Europe and the second largest city of Portugal, Porto. Located alongside the stunning Douro River, Porto is home ot the 2019 Laser Senior European Championships and Open European Trophy with all the top names of the class. Also, new ambitious senior sailors are on their way to the titles.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 2 - Reality
programme.desc: Now closing in on Mexico and having spent nearly a month at sea, the crew are facing some realities they didn’t expect. It’s cold, it’s wet, and its nothing like what they were hoping. Adding to the chaos, Barry is emotionally lost and opens up about what he left behind to go on this trip. As the crew pokes around Catalina Island and down into Mexico a reckoning with what the trip is and what they wanted it to be is on the horizon and with it a new reality of life.

programme.title: Inside Vienna - Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports
programme.desc: Welcome to Vienna!Austria’s capital, lying by the Danube River and known for its artistic and intellectual legacy shaped by residents as Mozart, Beethoven or Sigmund Freud amongst others. Vienna is a city known for its tradition, but has also become the scene for modern nautical sports that are shifting the world of water sports.From meeting the Austrian Olympic rowing team to freestyle kayaking and a rendezvous with the local Gondola Club, host Lucia Metzbauer is on a quest to discover the nautical sports and athletes of Vienna. She is set for a challenge as she sails across all the different sport options in the city.Become part of the Vienna scenery and discover the water sports this city has to offer from the side of Lucia Metzbauer, on Inside Vienna – Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 1
programme.desc: Our DJ adventure is about to begin! Come with us as we pack our bags and leave for sunny Ibiza in Spain. After dropping our bags we are saying hi to David Guetta before trying out our skills as DJs and finding out how Ibiza's nightlife will surprise us. Join us!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing Deejay continues its journey in Ibiza and the nearing islands to the rhythm of the night! Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: SXM Best Weekend
programme.desc: Ready for the best weekend of your lives? The SXM Best Weekend is one of the most anticipated Caribbean summer events of the year. A local group of young brothers and musicians called “The Red Eye Crew” decided to revolutionize the party scenario in these paradisiac islands. That is why they brought a party wave onto St. Maarten.Follow their crazy adventure as they organize this explosive event and share their inspiring story on how they came up with this idea and what drives them. A fun journey for party lovers, SXM Best Weekend will have you put your hands up and enjoy the queens of Caribbean music with blasting performances from Haitian rapper Wyclef Jean.Party your way around the Caribbean rhythm, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: One of the most physically testing competitions is coming soon to Nautical Channel. The Dusi Canoe Marathon is a one of a kind canoe and running endurance race set in the magnificent South African Drakensberg hills and rapids. Follow this years edition as some of the fittest men and women single handedly row the 120 km river and run over the hills carrying their custom built canoes over their shoulders. Who will come first in this prestigious African event?

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: Markkleeberg, in Germany, is home to the Pleisse River that runs through the city. Known for merging several towns over the years, it now combines the best athletes who compete in the Slalom World Cup.Watch the most extreme canoe slalom that will decide the world champion in this unique 2021 Markkleeberg competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Cup Prague
programme.desc: Prague hosts the 2021 Slalom World Cup, and the top class athletes are getting ready for a weekend full of action. They will have to pass through a combination of upstream and downstream gates in the fastest time possible, however the competition will prove to be hard as only the best will be in this event.Watch the Slalom World Cup competition that is taking place in Prague.

programme.title: Chasing Jaguars
programme.desc: A group of brave kayakers get on a plane and fly all the way from Europe to Costa Rica looking for exciting adventures and fast rapids. In Chasing Jaguars, this group of friends will discover the nature and wildlife of the Costa Rican Whitewater paradise.This unforgettable kayak-experience in Costa Rica takes us to the middle of the jungle between snakes and wild animals as the group chase after jaguars in the wild depth of the tropical landscape. They will go against fast waters, challenge heat and cold waters and enjoy a trip of a lifetime.Join them in Chasing Jaguars, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 17
programme.desc: The Anvera 48 is a maxi rib built entirely of carbon, and its aim was creating a sporty and sustainable product that was very efficient. We will test it on the water before moving to Castellammare di Stabia, in the Gulf of Naples to discover the Della Pasqua DC Seven Sport. Finally, The Boat Show is in Porto Piccolo to look around the Grand Soleil 48 Performance.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 18
programme.desc: We are in Cannes, in the Yachting Festival, looking for the Ferretti Yachts 720, so we are ready to discover what it hides onboard. Then, we visit in Italy a construction site that thinks about the present and future of nautical propulsion, the Anvera E Lab. Are you ready to find out what will come out from the future advances of the boating industry?

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 2 - Reality
programme.desc: Now closing in on Mexico and having spent nearly a month at sea, the crew are facing some realities they didn’t expect. It’s cold, it’s wet, and its nothing like what they were hoping. Adding to the chaos, Barry is emotionally lost and opens up about what he left behind to go on this trip. As the crew pokes around Catalina Island and down into Mexico a reckoning with what the trip is and what they wanted it to be is on the horizon and with it a new reality of life.

programme.title: P1 USA UIM Class 1 - Episode 6 Roar Offshore on Fort Myers, FL
programme.desc: The P1 welcomes the 2021 Roar Offshore Fort Myers Grand Prix, the final round of the APBA Offshore National Championship. Teams are making their final adjustments to their boats ahead of this weekend's national championship decider. The 5-mile course situated off Fort Myers Beach will see boats passing the shoreline and local Pier at over 130mph. Are you ready for the action? Watch the best moments of the competition, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 6 Review
programme.desc: The AquaX 2021 USA Championship season might be over, but we are still thrilled with the adrenaline lived these past months. It is time we look back at the most breath-taking moments of the championship, going from Daytona up to St Pete. Are you joining us? Relive the best moments of the 2021 AquaX USA Championship.

Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Preview
programme.desc: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Preview

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 1
programme.desc: South Africa has some of the best and most consistent surf breaks in the world but the qualifying series, for years, lacked events there. This year competitive surfing is back in South Africa and the season returned with a bang, with five QS Events ranging from 1 star, to 3 star, before culminating at the 6 star Ballito Pro. Let's reflect on the highlights of 2017.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.9 - OPATIJA - IČIĆI - MOSĆENIČKA DRAGA
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.9 - OPATIJA - IČIĆI - MOSĆENIČKA DRAGA

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Cup Markkleeberg
programme.desc: Markkleeberg, in Germany, is home to the Pleisse River that runs through the city. Known for merging several towns over the years, it now combines the best athletes who compete in the Slalom World Cup.Watch the most extreme canoe slalom that will decide the world champion in this unique 2021 Markkleeberg competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Cup Prague
programme.desc: Prague hosts the 2021 Slalom World Cup, and the top class athletes are getting ready for a weekend full of action. They will have to pass through a combination of upstream and downstream gates in the fastest time possible, however the competition will prove to be hard as only the best will be in this event.Watch the Slalom World Cup competition that is taking place in Prague.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this month's episode we move to the western edge of Europe and the second largest city of Portugal, Porto. Located alongside the stunning Douro River, Porto is home ot the 2019 Laser Senior European Championships and Open European Trophy with all the top names of the class. Also, new ambitious senior sailors are on their way to the titles.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 2 - Reality
programme.desc: Now closing in on Mexico and having spent nearly a month at sea, the crew are facing some realities they didn’t expect. It’s cold, it’s wet, and its nothing like what they were hoping. Adding to the chaos, Barry is emotionally lost and opens up about what he left behind to go on this trip. As the crew pokes around Catalina Island and down into Mexico a reckoning with what the trip is and what they wanted it to be is on the horizon and with it a new reality of life.

programme.title: Inside Vienna - Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports
programme.desc: Welcome to Vienna!Austria’s capital, lying by the Danube River and known for its artistic and intellectual legacy shaped by residents as Mozart, Beethoven or Sigmund Freud amongst others. Vienna is a city known for its tradition, but has also become the scene for modern nautical sports that are shifting the world of water sports.From meeting the Austrian Olympic rowing team to freestyle kayaking and a rendezvous with the local Gondola Club, host Lucia Metzbauer is on a quest to discover the nautical sports and athletes of Vienna. She is set for a challenge as she sails across all the different sport options in the city.Become part of the Vienna scenery and discover the water sports this city has to offer from the side of Lucia Metzbauer, on Inside Vienna – Imperial City Meets Nautical Sports.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 3 - Freedom
programme.desc: Deeper south into the Baja Peninsula, the weather has calm and sunny days are more common. As we open the episode with the boat breaking free from being trapped by an anchor locked in the reef, there is a new sense of freedom. On the horizon are rare and never-before seen islands with beached seals, isolated lighthouse keepers, and massive salt mines. As they discover the new and uncharted, word comes in that surf is coming and now the race is on to get the best location to capture the incoming waves.

programme.title: 52 Super Series - Episode 2
programme.desc: 52 Super Series - Episode 2

programme.title: VOR Identity
programme.desc: The Volvo Ocean Race visits 10 cities around the world making it the ultimate test for sailors around the world. Often described as the longest and toughest professional sporting event in the world, it is one of the sport’s Big Three events, alongside the Olympic Games and America’s Cup.However, to truly understand the race, it is better to think about the athletes who take part of it. Meet the teams and the superstars in Alicante on the eve of their quest to the Volvo Ocean Race. They share the same obsession for the sea, and many of them have fully dedicated themselves for years, even decades trying to win.Map the racecourse, get the latest intel on the boats and the tech and above all, find out what really moves the action of heroes from modern day offshore sailing. Watch it now, on Nautical Channel and become part of this sailing frenzy.

programme.title: VOR Supremacy
programme.desc: The Volvo Ocean Race sails around 10 cities from all over the world, making it the ultimate test for sailors. Often described as the longest and toughest professional sporting event in the world, it is one of the sport’s big three events, alongside the Olympic Games and America’s Cup.The cannon blast in Alicante sends off the fleet, and once again shakes the sailing world. The veterans finally get their memory back while for the rookies it feels like mission impossible. They share the same obsession for the sea, and many of them have fully dedicated themselves for years, even decades trying to win it.The 2017-18 edition of the Volvo Ocean Race sets sail around the globe. The challenge is full on, and now they are all going rogue.

As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.desc: Markkleeberg, in Germany, is home to the Pleisse River that runs through the city. Known for merging several towns over the years, it now combines the best athletes who compete in the Slalom World Cup.Watch the most extreme canoe slalom that will decide the world champion in this unique 2021 Markkleeberg competition.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Slalom World Cup Prague
programme.desc: Prague hosts the 2021 Slalom World Cup, and the top class athletes are getting ready for a weekend full of action. They will have to pass through a combination of upstream and downstream gates in the fastest time possible, however the competition will prove to be hard as only the best will be in this event.Watch the Slalom World Cup competition that is taking place in Prague.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep8 - Great Family Adventure - Jordan - Aqaba & Beyond
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman, Emily Jackson and family explore Petra by day and night and immerse themselves in the warm culture and hot weather of Jordan.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surf's Cooking
programme.desc: Matt Bromley is a renowned big wave surfer. Ollie Swart is a chef. Together, the two best friends will embark on an adventure down Cape Town’s coastline. Foraging for food and looking for the best surf spots, Surf’s Cooking brings gastronomy to the surfing world with this beautiful friendship.Both friends will have to quickly adapt and learn about each other. For Matt Bromley, learning about foraging for food and how to cook it properly will become challenging, and Ollie Swart will have to surf past the obstacles in this nautical sport. Will they be ready to share their passion between them?Watch their adventure in South Africa on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - 2014
programme.desc: Experience the most prestigious yachting event in the world! Nautical Channel will cover this luxurious event and will show you all there is the know about the most exclusive yachts of the year!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 3
programme.desc: Our aspiring DJs are learning all there is in the music industry and they cannot get enough of it! They are ready to apply what they have been learning these days, but are also eager to get into the water and do some sailing. Let's meet some more international DJs to find out a bit more about their music style.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 4
programme.desc: The music scene in Ibiza is strong and passionate, and our aspiring deejays are grasping all the knowledge they can at the time they enjoy the day and night in the Spanish island. But, will this be enough to propel their career in the music industry forwards?Let's find out in this new episode of Sailing Deejay!

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 3
programme.desc: Abi and Zita are slowly growing familiar with the boat, the sea and the wind. Amazing beaches, clear blue waters and a lot of fun is what the girls will come across in this new adventure in Skopelos. They will have to learn the hard way that life at sea requires, but the payoff for the hard part is worth it.

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this new episode of Jump on Board we set sail to Alonissos: the huge marine park of the Sporades. Nature and beauty will play the leading role here, as the girls experience the wild side of this journey. We'll be testing the typical Mediterranean dishes surrounded by clear waters. May the wind be with us!

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 3 - Freedom
programme.desc: Deeper south into the Baja Peninsula, the weather has calm and sunny days are more common. As we open the episode with the boat breaking free from being trapped by an anchor locked in the reef, there is a new sense of freedom. On the horizon are rare and never-before seen islands with beached seals, isolated lighthouse keepers, and massive salt mines. As they discover the new and uncharted, word comes in that surf is coming and now the race is on to get the best location to capture the incoming waves.
