programme.title: Julbo Sail Session
programme.desc: The mythical, legendary Cape Horn towers high in the imagination of all sailors. Located in the southern part of the Patagonia, sailors will travel from Usuaïa to Cap Horn. Passing it is always a feat so you can imagine the adventure two men set out for themselves when they dreamed of being the ﬁrst to pass it in a Nacra.Aboard a flying catamaran, the Julbo Session is a unique event that requires constant attention. The situation at the Julbo Sail season is tense and things become serious as the sailors have to push forward whatever happens, as the weather window is very brief and they have little time to succeed in their adventure.Embark on this journey across la Tierra del Fuego, a mystical place with extraordinary landscapes and incredible shifts in weather that allowed sailors in the Nacra to achieve a lifetime dream: pass Cape Horn aboard a flying catamaran.

programme.title: Behind The Scenes - Karujet World Championship
programme.desc: The much awaited 19th edition of the Karujet has finally roared through the island of Guadeloupe. With the world's top guns of Jet Ski racing on the pitch, these daredevils ploughed through waves at speeds of up to 80 knots.To bring this event to life, people from all over the world join to create what is becoming the biggest nautical event for Jet Ski lovers of the year. As competitors speed across the ocean, firm land spectators await in an exciting celebration. Who will become this year’s champion? Watch as Nautical Channel goes behind the scenes to interview the crazy brave competitors as we explore what it takes to fuel such a big event in the Caribbean island of Guadeloupe.

Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 3
programme.desc: Our aspiring DJs are learning all there is in the music industry and they cannot get enough of it! They are ready to apply what they have been learning these days, but are also eager to get into the water and do some sailing. Let's meet some more international DJs to find out a bit more about their music style.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 4
programme.desc: The music scene in Ibiza is strong and passionate, and our aspiring deejays are grasping all the knowledge they can at the time they enjoy the day and night in the Spanish island. But, will this be enough to propel their career in the music industry forwards?Let's find out in this new episode of Sailing Deejay!

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 3 - Freedom
programme.desc: Deeper south into the Baja Peninsula, the weather has calm and sunny days are more common. As we open the episode with the boat breaking free from being trapped by an anchor locked in the reef, there is a new sense of freedom. On the horizon are rare and never-before seen islands with beached seals, isolated lighthouse keepers, and massive salt mines. As they discover the new and uncharted, word comes in that surf is coming and now the race is on to get the best location to capture the incoming waves.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: The three-day event of the FNB Dusi Canoe Marathon is back again for the 2016 edition. Participants competing for the podium will have to trust their partners, be the best at route scouting and keep their focus until the very last moment, a task that is not easy at all. Both mental and physical preparation play a crucial part in one of the toughest paddling competitions. Relive the best moments of the 2016 edition of the Dusi Canoe Marathon.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Szeged
programme.desc: Szeged, the third biggest city in Hungary has been chosen once again for the International Canoe Federation Sprints World Cup. Athletes from all over the world are ready to prove their skills over the C2, K1, K2 categories. The event will prove to be hard as most of the athletes have been training for the Olympic Games.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 2 World Cup Barnaul
programme.desc: Barnaul, in Russia is a city to the west of the Ob River. This is one of the major rivers in Russia and home to the second stage of the Sprint World Cup. Despite the cold windy morning, more than 3000 people have assisted to watch athletes give their all in this competition.Watch the competition at Barnaul that concluded with the 5K challenge.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 20
programme.desc: Our journey this season on The Boat Show is approaching its end. To end it, we try out the Dominator 28M Ilumen, but we prefer to call it by its name Cadet V as every Dominator yacht is custom built for its owner. Then, in the immense range of Beneteau motorboats, the Flyer line includes entry models, and we try out the Flyer 8 Sundeck from this shipyard.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 3 - Freedom
programme.desc: Deeper south into the Baja Peninsula, the weather has calm and sunny days are more common. As we open the episode with the boat breaking free from being trapped by an anchor locked in the reef, there is a new sense of freedom. On the horizon are rare and never-before seen islands with beached seals, isolated lighthouse keepers, and massive salt mines. As they discover the new and uncharted, word comes in that surf is coming and now the race is on to get the best location to capture the incoming waves.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 3 - Freedom
programme.desc: Deeper south into the Baja Peninsula, the weather has calm and sunny days are more common. As we open the episode with the boat breaking free from being trapped by an anchor locked in the reef, there is a new sense of freedom. On the horizon are rare and never-before seen islands with beached seals, isolated lighthouse keepers, and massive salt mines. programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep8 - Great Family Adventure - Jordan - Aqaba & Beyond
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman, Emily Jackson and family explore Petra by day and night and immerse themselves in the warm culture and hot weather of Jordan.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: P1 USA UIM Class 1 - Episode 7 Key West Championship
programme.desc: The waiting is finally over for what many describe as the Super Bowl of offshore powerboat racing. The 40th annual UIM-RWO World Championships is about to take place, and more boats than expected will be participated in this week-long event. Adrenaline, power and the fastest boats on the water await for a show like no other. Are you going to miss out?

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 3
programme.desc: The third event of the GC32 Racing Tour is taking place in Villasimius, in Italy. Taking place in mid-September on Sardinia's southeastern point, the GC32 Racing Tour has worked hard with the authorities to plant here one of the most important international competitions in foiling racing. Will Allinghi continue their winning streak in Italian waters?Find out the best moments of the competition of the GC32 Villasimius World Championship.

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Surfing Games
programme.desc: Up to 200 surfers from 40 nations will battle for a medal in the ISA World Surfing Games 2017. Biarritz La Grande Plage will host the event, thus celebrating the 60th anniversary of surfing’s arrival in France. The athletes will compete for the titles: Men’s Individual, Women’s Individual, National World Champion, and Relay World Champion. Join us and have a taste of the high-performance surfing to come in Tokyo 2020!

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Adaptive Surfing Championship
programme.desc: This year’s anticipated 2017 ISA World Adaptive Surfing Championship will be held in sunny San Diego in the renown La Jolla neighborhood. The physically challenged surfers participate in teams of up to eight members, and represent their home countries as they race through the waters. With various events and a large following, the Championship is a fun and unique experience; both for the surfers and its spectators.

programme.title: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.10 - RIJEKA - NOVI VINODOLSKI - NOVIGRAD
programme.desc: Anchored in Paradise - Ep.10 - RIJEKA - NOVI VINODOLSKI - NOVIGRAD

programme.title: Tiree Wave Classic - 2016
programme.desc: For 30 years, a small sleepy island found off the North West Coast of Scotland has played host to one of the most prestigious events known amongst the windsurfing community. 61 competitors have arrived on the island for the Tiree Wave Classic. This is about to become the stage for top level windsurfing techniques in one of the most challenging conditions the UK has to offer.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 13
programme.desc: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 13

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.desc: For 30 years, a small sleepy island found off the North West Coast of Scotland has played host to one of the most prestigious events known amongst the windsurfing community. 61 competitors have arrived on the island for the Tiree Wave Classic. This is about to become the stage for top level windsurfing techniques in one of the most challenging conditions the UK has to offer.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep8 - Great Family Adventure - Jordan - Aqaba & Beyond
programme.desc: Pro kayakers Nick Troutman, Emily Jackson and family explore Petra by day and night and immerse themselves in the warm culture and hot weather of Jordan.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 3
programme.desc: The third event of the GC32 Racing Tour is taking place in Villasimius, in Italy. Taking place in mid-September on Sardinia's southeastern point, the GC32 Racing Tour has worked hard with the authorities to plant here one of the most important international competitions in foiling racing. Will Allinghi continue their winning streak in Italian waters?Find out the best moments of the competition of the GC32 Villasimius World Championship.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Szeged
programme.desc: Szeged, the third biggest city in Hungary has been chosen once again for the International Canoe Federation Sprints World Cup. Athletes from all over the world are ready to prove their skills over the C2, K1, K2 categories. The event will prove to be hard as most of the athletes have been training for the Olympic Games.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 2 World Cup Barnaul
programme.desc: Barnaul, in Russia is a city to the west of the Ob River. This is one of the major rivers in Russia and home to the second stage of the Sprint World Cup. Despite the cold windy morning, more than 3000 people have assisted to watch athletes give their all in this competition.Watch the competition at Barnaul that concluded with the 5K challenge.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 4 - Discovery
programme.desc: Deep into the empty desert of Mexico’s Baja Peninsula, the three are now in pursuit of a storm swell and predictions of surf. As the head towards what’s to be an iconic moment in the trip the stop off in Tortuga Bay and have a peculiar discovery of fossilized shark’s teeth deep in the heart of this cake yellow desert. Charging south on the heals of incoming surf they land in the midst of reach surf culture and smack in the middle of society. Now after over a month in isolation the three wrestle with the experience while chasing after the best waves of the trip.

programme.title: Semaine Du Golfe Du Morbihan
programme.desc: The Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan is an essential event for all classic sailing lovers. The Gulf Week is a maritime even set on the beautiful Morbihan Gulf, in Brittany, a French destination known for its gorgeous landscape. Expending on 35000 hectares, it is worth is reputation as the little sea. For one week, the Gulf will be letting more than 1000 ships rip through its waters. Rowing boats, lightships, classic sailing ships... almost 6000 sailors will take part in this year's edition. This joyful week has been organised in order to meet and share new experiences, so let's enduge in the best moments, most impressive boats and latest news of the 7th edition of the Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Season 4 of The Boat Show! Every week we bring you to the world of boating, so stay tuned. This time we will be testing the Ranieri Next 290 SH before moving to Florida and trying out the brand new Boston Whaler 380 Outrage. Finally, The Boat Show is aboard the Wally 100 Tango for a trial at sea.

programme.title: Alpine Freestyle Kayaking
programme.desc: Graz, at the south of Austria, is a popular tourist destination as it has been recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The Mur River is a defining feature of Graz. It runs through a total of four countries: Austria, Slovenia, Croatia and Hungary.Graz is also the home of Austria's number one Freestyle Kayaker Marcel Bloder. Together with him, we'll be exploring Graz and the Mur River and joining him on his journey to the 2013 ECA Freestyle Kayaking Euro Cup in Slovakia.Join Lucia Metzbauer in her new adventure in Graz in Alpine Freestyle Kayak.

programme.title: Monaco Yacht Show - Episode 1
programme.desc: Monaco Yacht Show - Episode 1

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are going to visit the Hippie Market at Formentera, famous all over the world for its unique type of creativity. We will be making new friends that will be teaching us about their favourite music styles and, this close to the end, will our two protagonists be getting sentimental? Not without a mojito at the beach first! Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 6
programme.desc: Our adventure is coming to an end, but the party never stops! Sam and Max have lived their adventure in Ibiza and Formentera, and have to get back home to show family and friends their new skills. We are sailing one last time and partying until dawn to make the most out of our time in Ibiza.

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 5
programme.desc: We are approaching our end of our trip and the next stop is Skiros. With the morning breeze we leave past the serene and calm location behind us on route to Skiros. Local dances, fun and life at sea are some of the things Greece has to offer, and in this short time we have seen how great friendships have started.

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 6
programme.desc: Mia has left the girls behind and we are reaching the sad ending of our trip. The crew sail from Skiros to Lavrion before Abi and Zita say their goodbyes to Georgios. Then, we recollect the best moments we have experienced in the Greek Islands with our two winners.

programme.desc: Deep into the empty desert of Mexico’s Baja Peninsula, the three are now in pursuit of a storm swell and predictions of surf. As the head towards what’s to be an iconic moment in the trip the stop off in Tortuga Bay and have a peculiar discovery of fossilized shark’s teeth deep in the heart of this cake yellow desert. Charging south on the heals of incoming surf they land in the midst of reach surf culture and smack in the middle of society. Now after over a month in isolation the three wrestle with the experience while chasing after the best waves of the trip.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 1 World Cup Szeged
programme.desc: Szeged, the third biggest city in Hungary has been chosen once again for the International Canoe Federation Sprints World Cup. Athletes from all over the world are ready to prove their skills over the C2, K1, K2 categories. The event will prove to be hard as most of the athletes have been training for the Olympic Games.

programme.title: International Canoe Federation World Cup - Sprint 2 World Cup Barnaul
programme.desc: Barnaul, in Russia is a city to the west of the Ob River. This is one of the major rivers in Russia and home to the second stage of the Sprint World Cup. Despite the cold windy morning, more than 3000 people have assisted to watch athletes give their all in this competition.Watch the competition at Barnaul that concluded with the 5K challenge.

programme.title: Postcards from Paros
programme.desc: Welcome to Paros, one of the islands in the Aegean Sea nestled between the Cyclades. Word spreads fast that Paros is one of the trendiest and most diverse islands in Greece, so we will be discovering more about this island’s history, culture and nautical destinations.Discover Paros flavours and visit the environmental and cultural part of Pars, protected for its indigenous fauna and flora, its positions in history and, of course, its marvellous beaches. Send Postcards from Paros, a pearl in the Aegean Sea worth discovering.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Dusi Canoe Marathon - Episode 1
programme.desc: The 2017 edition of the FNB Dusi Canoe Marathon, raced over three days from Pietermaritzburg to Durban on the East Coast of South Africa is always tough paddling and portaging. With the country in the grips of the two year long drought, it became a whole lot tougher. Low rivers and searing hot weather, and the final stage raced on an empty river! Discover the best moments of the 65th Dusi Canoe Marathon.

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise
programme.desc: In Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise Nikolai visits the crystal blue lagoons, encounters sharks and stingrays and witnesses the 6th edition of the Muramur surfski race in Tahiti. The intensive 38 km race meandering through reefs that surround the mystic island of Bora Bora is bound to make you pack your flippers and book a flight to the exotic French Polynesia.You can now watch this exclusive show that will take you to one of the world’s most beautiful sceneries on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Nice Ultimed
programme.desc: From April 24th to May 6th, four elite skippers will respectively compete on the biggest racing boats in the world. Nice UltiMed is a clash of titans right in the heart of the Mediterranean, and it is worthy of the attention of spectators worldwide.The crews of 3-6 will participate in an offshore sprint, starting and ending in Nice, France. They will be sailing on maxi trimarans measuring more than 30 meters and will pass by Corsica, Sardinia, the Balearic Islands, and the coastline of the Région Provence-Alpes-Côte d´Azur.The skippers will be sailing assisted by their crews on their maxi trimarans, exploiting the full power and speed of these machines.Have you ever seen anything like it? Join us as we follow along on what promises to be an unprecedented race where outstanding sailors are capable of taming the oceans single-handedly on the Ultimed.

programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Taking place in mid-September on Sardinia's southeastern point, the GC32 Racing Tour has worked hard with the authorities to plant here one of the most important international competitions in foiling racing. Will Allinghi continue their winning streak in Italian waters?Find out the best moments of the competition of the GC32 Villasimius World Championship.

programme.title: Cape Verdean Kite Crossing
programme.desc: Mitu Monteiro, a Cape Verdean kitesurfer and multi-time world champion, attempts the solo crossing of the twelve volcanic islands of his native archipelago, never accomplished before.Taking on more than 730km of kitesurfing, interspersed with island traverses by only man-powered means totalling approximately 200km, Mitu’s challenges lay ahead of him. With a total trajectory of nearly 1,000km and a route that had to be thought and rethought due to wind direction, shark infested waters, and distances that push this athlete to his limit, sweat will flow and his nerves will surely be put to the test.Mitu’s maverick journey across marvellous Atlantic waters and beaches, through inhospitable lunar landscapes and the lush vegetation of the volcanic islands is truly a SURFARI on a kite. Relive the whole experience on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise
programme.desc: In Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise Nikolai visits the crystal blue lagoons, encounters sharks and stingrays and witnesses the 6th edition of the Muramur surfski race in Tahiti. The intensive 38 km race meandering through reefs that surround the mystic island of Bora Bora is bound to make you pack your flippers and book a flight to the exotic French Polynesia.You can now watch this exclusive show that will take you to one of the world’s most beautiful sceneries on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 4 - Discovery
programme.desc: Deep into the empty desert of Mexico’s Baja Peninsula, the three are now in pursuit of a storm swell and predictions of surf. As the head towards what’s to be an iconic moment in the trip the stop off in Tortuga Bay and have a peculiar discovery of fossilized shark’s teeth deep in the heart of this cake yellow desert. Charging south on the heals of incoming surf they land in the midst of reach surf culture and smack in the middle of society. Now after over a month in isolation the three wrestle with the experience while chasing after the best waves of the trip.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are going to visit the Hippie Market at Formentera, famous all over the world for its unique type of creativity. We will be making new friends that will be teaching us about their favourite music styles and, this close to the end, will our two protagonists be getting sentimental? Not without a mojito at the beach first! Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 6
programme.desc: Our adventure is coming to an end, but the party never stops! Sam and Max have lived their adventure in Ibiza and Formentera, and have to get back home to show family and friends their new skills. We are sailing one last time and partying until dawn to make the most out of our time in Ibiza.

programme.desc: For 30 years, a small sleepy island found off the North West Coast of Scotland has played host to one of the most prestigious events known amongst the windsurfing community. 61 competitors have arrived on the island for the Tiree Wave Classic. This is about to become the stage for top level windsurfing techniques in one of the most challenging conditions the UK has to offer.

Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

programme.title: ISA World Jr Surfing Championship - Episode 1 - El Salvador
programme.desc: ISA World Jr Surfing Championship - Episode 1 - El Salvador

programme.title: International Surfing Association World Championship - World Longboard Surfing Championship
programme.desc: An acclaimed competition thanks to the singularity of the longboard, this year’s 2018 ISA World Longboard Championship is back in the races. This year the competition will see 71 athletes from 22 nations surfing for the podium. And thanks to this year’s high-end location in Wanning, China, the championship will be even more exciting. Join us as we watch the best moments of this anticipated event!

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: The Women and the Waves - Part 1
programme.desc: We begin our journey through the history of female surf in The Women and the Waves Part 1. The show is separated in two parts, as we explore the world created by surfer girls, women who surf, women who don’t, female athletes, and the men who love them. Get to know what it means to surf like a girl in this inspiring film that features generations of women surfers.

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise
programme.desc: In Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise Nikolai visits the crystal blue lagoons, encounters sharks and stingrays and witnesses the 6th edition of the Muramur surfski race in Tahiti. The intensive 38 km race meandering through reefs that surround the mystic island of Bora Bora is bound to make you pack your flippers and book a flight to the exotic French Polynesia.You can now watch this exclusive show that will take you to one of the world’s most beautiful sceneries on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Tour - Episode 1
programme.desc: GWA Wingfoil World Tour - Episode 1

programme.title: 52 Super Series - Episode 3
programme.desc: 52 Super Series - Episode 3

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 4 - Discovery
programme.desc: Deep into the empty desert of Mexico’s Baja Peninsula, the three are now in pursuit of a storm swell and predictions of surf. As the head towards what’s to be an iconic moment in the trip the stop off in Tortuga Bay and have a peculiar discovery of fossilized shark’s teeth deep in the heart of this cake yellow desert. Charging south on the heals of incoming surf they land in the midst of reach surf culture and smack in the middle of society. Now after over a month in isolation the three wrestle with the experience while chasing after the best waves of the trip.

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are going to visit the Hippie Market at Formentera, famous all over the world for its unique type of creativity. We will be making new friends that will be teaching us about their favourite music styles and, this close to the end, will our two protagonists be getting sentimental? Not without a mojito at the beach first! Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 6
programme.desc: Our adventure is coming to an end, but the party never stops! Sam and Max have lived their adventure in Ibiza and Formentera, and have to get back home to show family and friends their new skills. We are sailing one last time and partying until dawn to make the most out of our time in Ibiza.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Ep9 - Kayaking Northern California
programme.desc: Facing Waves - Ep9 - Kayaking Northern California

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Season 4 of The Boat Show! Every week we bring you to the world of boating, so stay tuned. This time we will be testing the Ranieri Next 290 SH before moving to Florida and trying out the brand new Boston Whaler 380 Outrage. Finally, The Boat Show is aboard the Wally 100 Tango for a trial at sea.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 4
programme.desc: We arrive to Spain for the GC32 Mar Menor Cup! The crews are ready for a grandiose final of the season as this is their last chance to improve their standings. Precision, coordination and pure skill is of essence, and Spanish waters will prove to be harder to navigate than expected. Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Sailing to Tokyo 2020! We begin this first episode by travelling to Sorento in Melbourne, Australia, where the 2020 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships took place. A fleet of 116 sailors from 31 nations gathered in Sorento Sailing Couta Boat Club to challenge for the prestigious titles. Later on, we examine how the Coronavirus pandemic affected an athlete's routine. With the majority of the countries instituting some sort of stay-at-home order, public gatherings of any kind were banned, and numerous sport events were postponed and cancelled.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 5 - Return
programme.desc: After nearly two months at sea, which now seems like lifetimes compounded by the suffering and challenge of the passage. The three are closing out their trip home and saving the best for last. Shocked by what seems to be death island, the three uncover shark hunters and in their last village before departure battle to resupply with the essentials of gas and water with the last pennies on the boat. Meanwhile the struggles of our filmmaker’s journey return along with the fear of going back to all that was left behind.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 12

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 3
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 3

programme.title: Transat Bretagne - Martinique
programme.desc: Fifteen sailors, 3500 miles and one epic race. The Transat Bretagne-Martinique departs from the French coast and sailors travel in solitary across the Atlantic Ocean in the monohulls class Figaro Bénéteau. With eight rookies in the line-up and veterans that know the perils of the journey, this race will prove to be a hard endurance test on the participants.The course is long and treacherous, and for over 2 weeks, these athletes will have to fight against harsh conditions to reach the Caribbean destination. Will the young passion from the rookies really be enough to trump hard-earned experience?Find out the outcome of the Transat Bretagne – Martinique, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Inside Kiel - Sailing Capital and more
programme.desc: Kiel is the nautical epicentre of Germany, and the proud host of the world's biggest sailing event, the Kieler Woche. From learning how to sail a Formula18 catamaran to exploring local kitesurf spots and shipyards, Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer will be there, diving into the local nautical scene and finding out why there are so many young sailors in Kiel.Join her in Kieler Woche, one of the largest sailing events in the world. With regattas sailing at the highest level and an unbeatable class diversity, entertainment is secured as we learn everything about this German event that drives the attention of sailors worldwide.

programme.title: Rolex World Sailing Awards - Episode 1
programme.desc: 2021 has marked a great year in the nautical world. With the Olympics, America's Cup and Vendee Globe, it is great sailing is back and strong. Let's look back on the past year and find out who of this year's nominees will become World Sailor of the Year as well as what sustainable project has been received the World Sailing 11th Hour Racing Sustainability Award.

Will the young passion from the rookies really be enough to trump hard-earned experience?Find out the outcome of the Transat Bretagne – Martinique, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Welcome to The Boat Show, the program dedicated to nautica, sports and excitement. In today's episode we will discover the Mercury Diesel 6.7L, built by FB Design. Then we will get onboard the Lomac Adrenalina 10.5 before trying out the Master 996 con 2x350 cv Suzuki. Dive in with us!

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to our new adventure of Jump on Board! We are with Abi and our captain Marcos, and we will be sailing the Ionian Islands with the new girls: Cindy, Caitlin and Linda. The islands are known for their pristine clear blue waters, strong wind and unspoiled nature. Are you jumping on board with us?

programme.title: Jump On Board - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode of Jump on Board, the girls and I will sail from Corfu to Paxos, the island created by Poseidon according to Greek mythology when he struck his trident on Corfu, breaking it in two. Let's hope that Linda, Cindy and Caitlin don't divide like the islands as they get to know each other better. Jump on board with us to find out!

With eight rookies in the line-up and veterans that know the perils of the journey, this race will prove to be a hard endurance test on the participants.The course is long and treacherous, and for over 2 weeks, these athletes will have to fight against harsh conditions to reach the Caribbean destination. Will the young passion from the rookies really be enough to trump hard-earned experience?Find out the outcome of the Transat Bretagne – Martinique, on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 1

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 2

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise
programme.desc: In Bora Bora: Paddling Paradise Nikolai visits the crystal blue lagoons, encounters sharks and stingrays and witnesses the 6th edition of the Muramur surfski race in Tahiti. The intensive 38 km race meandering through reefs that surround the mystic island of Bora Bora is bound to make you pack your flippers and book a flight to the exotic French Polynesia.You can now watch this exclusive show that will take you to one of the world’s most beautiful sceneries on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 4
programme.desc: We arrive to Spain for the GC32 Mar Menor Cup! The crews are ready for a grandiose final of the season as this is their last chance to improve their standings. Precision, coordination and pure skill is of essence, and Spanish waters will prove to be harder to navigate than expected. Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - GP Italy - Runabout
programme.desc: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - GP Italy - Runabout

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Sailing to Tokyo 2020! We begin this first episode by travelling to Sorento in Melbourne, Australia, where the 2020 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships took place. A fleet of 116 sailors from 31 nations gathered in Sorento Sailing Couta Boat Club to challenge for the prestigious titles. Later on, we examine how the Coronavirus pandemic affected an athlete's routine. With the majority of the countries instituting some sort of stay-at-home order, public gatherings of any kind were banned, and numerous sport events were postponed and cancelled.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 5 - Return
programme.desc: After nearly two months at sea, which now seems like lifetimes compounded by the suffering and challenge of the passage. The three are closing out their trip home and saving the best for last. Shocked by what seems to be death island, the three uncover shark hunters and in their last village before departure battle to resupply with the essentials of gas and water with the last pennies on the boat. Meanwhile the struggles of our filmmaker’s journey return along with the fear of going back to all that was left behind.

programme.title: Skeleton Sea
programme.desc: João and Xandi, two surfers in their early 50′s, have been working together for 25 years. They clean beaches and with the trash they pick they create the most stunning artwork. However, living as an artist and idealist in Portugal is not economically profitable and, therefore, not easy.Their family life is affected by the choices they make and their wish to raise awareness about the ever-growing pollution in our oceans. Skeleton Sea takes us on their personal journey to help people understand the importance of our oceans to help us take the step to change our habits to keep them clean. As all live comes from the sea, Skeleton Sea reminds us that this powerful force has the ability of taking it away from us as well.

programme.title: Sylt - The Queen Of The North Sea
programme.desc: Welcome to Sylt! The northernmost island of Germany spreads for 40 kilometers and has been since ages a top nautical location. All year round you can find action here at the North Sea, and Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer is ready to disembark in this location and explore the queen of the North Sea with our team. She will meet the locals, get to know the hidden gems, the best places for surfing and sailing, discover the wildlife and explore the enormous PWA Grand Slam in Sylt – the windsurfing event to be! Get ready to dive into Sylt's secrets as we wander around an UNESCO World Heritage Site and get splashed with the windsurf action. Let's get going to Sylt - The Queen of the North Sea!

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to The Boat Show, the program dedicated to nautica, sports and excitement. In today's episode we will discover the Mercury Diesel 6.7L, built by FB Design. Then we will get onboard the Lomac Adrenalina 10.5 before trying out the Master 996 con 2x350 cv Suzuki. Dive in with us!

programme.title: AF Offshore
programme.desc: AF Offshore

programme.title: Sails In Sardinia
programme.desc: Sails in Sardinia takes us to the beautiful Italian island of Sardinia, the sescond largest island in the Mediterranean Sea, to visit the Yacht Club Costa Smeralda, in Porto Cervo. Known for being visited by the rich and famous, it also has a unique sailing history. We will get the true essence of competitive sailing at the Audi Settimana Delle Bocche, where the last leg of the TP52 Super Series is being held. We are meeting Ricardo Bonadeo, Commodore of the yacht club, to understand better how the 1967 non-profit organization has become today a world's leading organizer in international sailing events. Join Andi Van Zyl as she heads to the beautiful Costa Smeralda and interviews other big sailing personalities as Francesco Bruni and Terry Hutchinson, on Sails in Sardinia.

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 3
programme.desc: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 3

programme.title: Transat Bretagne - Martinique
programme.desc: Fifteen sailors, 3500 miles and one epic race. The Transat Bretagne-Martinique departs from the French coast and sailors travel in solitary across the Atlantic Ocean in the monohulls class Figaro Bénéteau. With eight rookies in the line-up and veterans that know the perils of the journey, this race will prove to be a hard endurance test on the participants.The course is long and treacherous, and for over 2 weeks, these athletes will have to fight against harsh conditions to reach the Caribbean destination. Will the young passion from the rookies really be enough to trump hard-earned experience?Find out the outcome of the Transat Bretagne – Martinique, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to Sailing to Tokyo 2020! We begin this first episode by travelling to Sorento in Melbourne, Australia, where the 2020 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships took place. A fleet of 116 sailors from 31 nations gathered in Sorento Sailing Couta Boat Club to challenge for the prestigious titles. Later on, we examine how the Coronavirus pandemic affected an athlete's routine. With the majority of the countries instituting some sort of stay-at-home order, public gatherings of any kind were banned, and numerous sport events were postponed and cancelled.

programme.title: Reaching Reality - Episode 5 - Return
programme.desc: After nearly two months at sea, which now seems like lifetimes compounded by the suffering and challenge of the passage. The three are closing out their trip home and saving the best for last. Shocked by what seems to be death island, the three uncover shark hunters and in their last village before departure battle to resupply with the essentials of gas and water with the last pennies on the boat. Meanwhile the struggles of our filmmaker’s journey return along with the fear of going back to all that was left behind.

programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 1

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 2
programme.desc: Kite Masters - Episode 2

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 4
programme.desc: We arrive to Spain for the GC32 Mar Menor Cup! The crews are ready for a grandiose final of the season as this is their last chance to improve their standings. Precision, coordination and pure skill is of essence, and Spanish waters will prove to be harder to navigate than expected. Will Allinghi take the overall victory?Watch the best moments of the GC32 Mar Menor Cup 2021.

programme.title: Surf Ski - Episode 1 - Perth
programme.desc: Welcome to Perth, Australia for the Surfski World Tour. The Perth Doctor is the second leg of the championship, and Jasper Mocké, the younger brother of four times Surfski World Series winner Dawid Mocke has already started strong in the Mandurrah Duel. Will he win again in Perth? Let's find out on Surf Ski!

programme.title: Surf Ski - Episode 2 - Mauritius
programme.desc: This time we are in Mauritius for the fifth leg of the Surf Ski World Tour. Athletes are getting hyped up for the Mauritius Ocean Classic, and many want to stop Jasper Mocké from winning as he has already won 3 of the 4 events disputed so far this season. Could Hank McGregor, winner of the Molokai Challenge, be his strongest challenger?

programme.title: Surf Ski - Episode 3 - Durban
programme.desc: Welcome to Durban! The Surf Ski World Tour is reaching its end, and standing at the pinnacle of the sport, the best open ocean paddlers from around the worlds reunite to take part in it. Jasper Mocké has proved to be in shape all season, but we have seen other important names raise to the top. Discover the exciting world of surf ski on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship - Episode 1
programme.desc: 175 of the world's best kayakers are gathering for the 10th anniversary edition of the Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship. They are committed to find the ideal or "sickest" line on this challenging competition. Racing up the creek, they are fighting for the world championship. Watch the best moments of the 2017 Adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Episode 6 - GP Suzuki
programme.desc: Dehesa Montenmedio farewells this October Tour with the Grand Prix Suzuki. The 1.55m circuit designed by Javier Trenor has seen 6 pairs of riders and horses achieve the jump-off, but the challenge is just starting. Riders rush through the CSIO3* course, and results are unpredictable. Watch the best moments of the GP Suzuki celebrated in Spain 2021.

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 8

programme.title: Jumping International de Dinard - Tropicana Derby of Dinard
programme.desc: The mythical Tropicana Derby is one of the categories inside the Jumping International de Dinard, and it offers a combination of traditional and natural fences over a particularly long distance of 1100m that will bring both horse and rider to their limit. Relive the best moments of Dinards Tropicana Derby with a jumping height over 1.45m.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 5 - Stockholm
programme.desc: Peder Fredricson is standing in the top of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2021 rankings this year, however things can change quickly during the fifth leg in Stockholm. The Global Champions Tour Grand Prix of Stockholm disputed in the Olympic Stadium will prove to be a test like no other.Watch the 2021 LGCT Stockholm competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 5 - Stockholm
programme.desc: Stockholm is hosting the fifth leg of the GCL 2021 edition. The Swedish capital has set the Olympic Stadium as the chosen venue for this clash of titans. Previously, Paris Panthers had its first win of the tournament in Valkenswaard. Will they be able to repeat this success in Stockholm?Watch the best moments of the CSI5* 1.55M GCL 2021 edition in its fifth leg.

programme.title: FEI Dressage European Championship - Riesenbeck - Individual Competition
programme.desc: FEI Dressage European Championship - Riesenbeck - Individual Competition

programme.title: FEI Dressage World Cup - Episode 1 - Salzburg
programme.desc: Welcome to Salzburg for the second leg of the FEI Dressage World Cup. We are in Austria to see some of the very best horse and rider combinations in the sport. Celebrating its 35th year, the FEI Dressage World Cup is the most distinguished individual competition in the international dressage calendar. Despite these challenging times and many events getting cancelled, Salzburg has proved herself a safe host to bring back the sport. Relive the highlights of the competition in Salzburg in the FEI Dressage World Cup of 2021.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses & Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Millstreet
programme.desc: For the fifth leg of the Event Rider Masters we head to the 'Land of the Horse' for the first time. Millstreet in Ireland is the chosen venue this time, and the Cross-Country Course in the adjoining Drishane Castle Demesne has quickly established itself as a favourite amongst the best riders of the world. Be part of the best moments of the competition at Millstreet.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 18 - New York
programme.desc: New York is the chosen scenery for the eighteenth leg of the 2019 edition of the Longines Global Champions Tour. Riders still have a chance to change the scores and improve their rankings, so they will have to beat the obstacles under the sky of the Big Apple. Will they be able to change the scores of the competition?Watch the highlights of the 2019 LGCT competition in New York.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 18 - New York
programme.desc: We are reaching the final moments of the Global Champions League. The eighteenth leg of the 2019 edition is finally here, and riders are ready to give their all this close to the end. We move to New York, the Big Apple, to enjoy this internationally awarded event that drives the attention of riders and public worldwide. Be part of the showjumping event that is moving the equestrian world. Relive the best moments of the eighteenth leg of the 2019 GCL

programme.title: FEI Dressage World Cup - Salzburg Competition
programme.desc: Welcome to Salzburg!The second leg of the Western European League inside the FEI Dressage World Cup takes place in the Austrian city. We are ready to see some of the very best horse and rider combinations in the sport and immerse in the city Mozart grew up in. Celebrating its 35th year, Dressage World Cup is the most distinguished individual competition in the international dressage calendar, rising at four leagues across the world: Western Europe, Central Europe, North America and Asia Pacific. The Western European League gathers together Europe's nine best dressage competitions, and, despite these challenging times, Salzburg has proved to be a safe destination where the exquisiteness of dressage will feel just like at home. Follow the Fei Dressage World Cup from Salzburg to find out what rider takes the upper hand in this competition.

programme.title: Cavalli a Roma - Best Moments
programme.desc: Cavalli a Roma mixes tradition with innovation, delighting the public with show jumping competitions, equestrian art and traditional shows that grasp both adults and children's attention. Now, on HorseTV you can revive all the emotions and best impressions of the 2020 edition.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 5 - Stockholm
programme.desc: Peder Fredricson is standing in the top of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2021 rankings this year, however things can change quickly during the fifth leg in Stockholm. The Global Champions Tour Grand Prix of Stockholm disputed in the Olympic Stadium will prove to be a test like no other.Watch the 2021 LGCT Stockholm competition.

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 5 - Stockholm
programme.desc: Stockholm is hosting the fifth leg of the GCL 2021 edition. The Swedish capital has set the Olympic Stadium as the chosen venue for this clash of titans. Previously, Paris Panthers had its first win of the tournament in Valkenswaard. Will they be able to repeat this success in Stockholm?Watch the best moments of the CSI5* 1.55M GCL 2021 edition in its fifth leg.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Episode 6 - GP Suzuki
programme.desc: Dehesa Montenmedio farewells this October Tour with the Grand Prix Suzuki. The 1.55m circuit designed by Javier Trenor has seen 6 pairs of riders and horses achieve the jump-off, but the challenge is just starting. Riders rush through the CSIO3* course, and results are unpredictable. Watch the best moments of the GP Suzuki celebrated in Spain 2021.

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 7
programme.desc: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 7

programme.title: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 8
programme.desc: FEI Ride Originals - Episode 8

programme.title: Jumping International de Dinard - Tropicana Derby of Dinard
programme.desc: The mythical Tropicana Derby is one of the categories inside the Jumping International de Dinard, and it offers a combination of traditional and natural fences over a particularly long distance of 1100m that will bring both horse and rider to their limit. Relive the best moments of Dinards Tropicana Derby with a jumping height over 1.45m.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this new episode, we first realize the vet check to determine whether the horse is in good physical condition to take part in the competition. Once everything is fine with our horses, we check our rider's boots and then get a good night sleep as we will have to wake up at 6 for Manuel's class.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 7
programme.desc: The educational program that lasted a week is finally reaching its end. Participants had their cell phones taken away and were given food, clothes and taught how to take care of their horses. Now, they are sad their adventure is over but share with us their final impressions for the week.

programme.title: Event Rider Masters - Millstreet
programme.desc: For the fifth leg of the Event Rider Masters we head to the 'Land of the Horse' for the first time. Millstreet in Ireland is the chosen venue this time, and the Cross-Country Course in the adjoining Drishane Castle Demesne has quickly established itself as a favourite amongst the best riders of the world. Be part of the best moments of the competition at Millstreet.

programme.title: German High Goal Polo Championship - German High Goal Polo Championship
programme.desc: The German Polo Tour has been the top polo league in Germany since 2010. Now, rivalling teams will have to compete in the Prussian & Country Club Berlin-Brandenburg for the Cup. The final between Carfactory and Riller & Schmauck is now on. Enjoy the competition and follow the top level of german polo in Horse TV.

programme.title: Jumping International Bordeaux - Grand Prix Land Rover
programme.desc: The CSI5*W Grand Prix Land Rover Trophée is one of the most awaited competitions in the Jumping International de Bordeaux. With a height of 1.60m, it is one of the toughest tests in the French event. Riders will have to show their perseverance, effort and speed in the obstacle course in order to get a spot in the podium.Relieve the best moments of the Grand Prix Land Rover 2019 edition.

programme.title: FEI Dressage European Championship - Riesenbeck - Individual Competition
programme.desc: FEI Dressage European Championship - Riesenbeck - Individual Competition

programme.title: FEI Dressage World Cup - Episode 1 - Salzburg
programme.desc: Welcome to Salzburg for the second leg of the FEI Dressage World Cup. We are in Austria to see some of the very best horse and rider combinations in the sport. Celebrating its 35th year, the FEI Dressage World Cup is the most distinguished individual competition in the international dressage calendar. Despite these challenging times and many events getting cancelled, Salzburg has proved herself a safe host to bring back the sport. Relive the highlights of the competition in Salzburg in the FEI Dressage World Cup of 2021.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 2: Stories from the Stud
programme.desc: This week Ride seeks out the scorching sands of Kuwait where the Arabian Horse reigns supreme, skims the surf on the Emerald Isle with the Connemara Ponies of Cashel Bay Stud and recognises the dressage stars of the future at the home of Germany’s Olympic Gold Medalist Sonke Rothenberger.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses & Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.desc: In this new episode, we first realize the vet check to determine whether the horse is in good physical condition to take part in the competition.
