programme.title: Meditation Now - The Mind
programme.desc: Find your way to a comfortable seated position and join in with Kino for this beach side meditation. Cultivate a state of stillness, presence, and deep inner awareness. Find ease and rest as you use this time to take a break from the chatter of the mind.

programme.title: Meditation Now - Eka Tattva
programme.desc: Train your mind in the exercise of concentration as Kino guides you through this 15-minute, beach meditation on the shores of Tulum. Focus your attention on the breath and begin to notice the intricacies of how you breathe.

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Breath
programme.desc: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self. This class uses chair pose to explore both physical embodiment and to fuel our inner journey into yoga. Join us for a practice that will bring awareness into your hips and legs, using props to support the postures where needed. Let Kino guide you into a stronger awareness of Agni, the inner fire that burns through impurities and helps the mind see clearer.

programme.title: Yoga Is Prayer
programme.desc: Todays class offers an opportunity to understand practice as prayer. Join Kino as she uses Digasana, also known as Warrior 3, as an opportunity to feel the quiet turning inward of the mind. The Warrior postures help you connect to a sense of inner strength. Let Kino guide you through communion with self and you higher power as you flow through a challenging, prop supported balancing sequence.

programme.title: Culinary Travels With Dave Eckert
programme.desc: Trek down the coast of California to find the Golden State's most relaxing resorts and delicious dining, with special stops in Napa, San Francisco, and Monterey.

programme.title: Culinary Travels With Dave Eckert
programme.desc: Get ready to explore the wonders of Single Malt Whisky with Culinary Travels. We will tour the famous Glenfiddich Distillery before taste testing an amazing glass of Balvenie.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: Wolfgang Puck's success spans decades. Phil takes us to Cut by Wolfgang Puck in Singapore where Executive Chef Joshua Brown, Manager Wes Guild, and Chef Michael Hadobas reveal the magic behind the drinks and dishes that adorn Cut's menu.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: Isadora Chai is an unconventional chef whose passion for food led her away from the corporate world to open Antara Restaurant in Kuala Lumpur where she now inspires the world through her cooking that is based on comforting flavors of home.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: The Tippling Club pairs award-winning cuisine with world-class cocktails and pushes the limits of combining fresh ingredients with unique textures. Chef and Owner Ryan Clift's inspiring culinary journey shines through in Tippling's dishes.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: Stephanie Carrier introduces us to the sensational Laguna Resort and Spa in Nusa Dua before Executive Chef Made Putra prepares a few of his memorable signature seafood dishes on the beach, and back at Arwana Restaurant.

programme.title: Food Relay
programme.desc: Paige discovers how one river split Serbia's geography, history, and food. Belgrade is infused with Turkish influence, whereas Novi Sad's Austrian roots run deep. Will Paige successfully hunt the poultry required for a Thanksgiving meal?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Cambodia: With a friend along for the ride, Tony travels to Phnom Penh, Cambodia, where he explores a food culture that is both pleasing to the palette and slightly frightening.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony returns to his beloved Hanoi, Vietnam to visit his friend, Linh, for the Vietnamese lunar New Year holiday of Tet. Together they enjoy the holiday and indulge in all the exotic delicacies Vietnamese culture offers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Rural Japan: Tony decides to look for a more relaxing, traditional Japanese culinary experience in the countryside. Tony travels to an old-style Japanese inn that specializes in kaiseki cuisine, ancient tea ceremony, and local ingredients.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy's iconic first dish is Crispy Belly Pork. In the classroom Joe Swash creates Veggie Singapore Noodles. Jeremy then makes Tea Smoked Duck and Pancakes, followed by a Macanese Egg Tart, the perfect accompaniment for a cup of tea.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy starts with mouthwatering Sichuanese Chicken. During his lesson, will Joe master the Wonton fold? On the Gower Peninsula, Jeremy makes spicy Xinjiang Lamb and Mixed Veg Skewers, followed by a beautiful, spicy Steamed Plum Pudding.

programme.title: Culinary Travels With Dave Eckert
programme.desc: Culinary Travels is braving the cold to discover the freshest, most distinct flavors of Canada. From local coffee and ice cream to cuisine that travels directly from the farm to the table, here we will taste the very best of Ontario.

programme.title: Culinary Travels With Dave Eckert
programme.desc: Culinary Travels has found some incredible flavors in Napa Valley, California. We will be sampling the region's famous wines before discovering fresh cuisine at two luxury resorts.

programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: Yotam begins his Mediterranean journey in the vibrant city of Marrakesh, inspiring his inner chef to create. He then travels to the luminous Atlas Mountains to dine with the Berbers before venturing onward to the coastal town of Essaouria.

programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: Turkish cuisine channels cultural currents from all compass points, and Istanbul is the perfect city to experience this cornucopia of unique culinary dishes. Ottolenghi also dines at Asitane Restaurant, visits the Grand Bazaar, and more.

programme.title: Chuck and the First Peoples' Kitchen
programme.desc: Chuck travels to Kitigan Zibi where he meets Cezin Nottaway. Together they gather ingredients by first going sugarbushing for maple syrup. Upon searching for the precious springtime liquid, they unexpectedly discover a delicious surprise.

programme.title: Chuck and the First Peoples' Kitchen
programme.desc: Chuck travels to Iqaluit, an Inuit community in Nunavut. He and Johnny Flaherty go ice fishing, when suddenly a squall moves in wreaking havoc on their ambitions. Even so, Chuck's new friends gladly share their diet with him.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: Kathy McCabe invites you to experience the essence of Rome. Discover the Testaccio Market's incredible food, taste true Roman Cacio e Pepe and gelato, learn the beautiful craft of mosaics, and attend a grand ball at Palazzo Brancaccio.

programme.title: Dream of Italy
programme.desc: There is only one Venice. Join Kathy as she receives rowing lessons from an 8th-generation gondolier and learns how Venice is contending with rising sea levels. We will also meet an impiraressa and visit the ancient Rialto Market.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Chios is a wealthy, relatively undiscovered, island in the Aegean Sea known for silk, citrus, and a wealth of food lore, including mastiha, an ancient superfood. Diane learns to make pasta from a local cook inspiring her to cook some more.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Cooking over fire is one of the most ancient methods of preparing food, and in Greece, they say that one can learn how to cook, but you were born to grill. Meet one of the best Greek grill chefs who shares his secrets of cooking over fire.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On a cruise to Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet culture of its local farmers, not the dazzling side of Greece’s party island. Join her as she cooks with a young chef who is breathing new life into the island's traditional recipes.

programme.title: Savour Australia
programme.desc: In Darwin, Jason swims in the Crocodile Tank and visits Litchfield National Park. He also goes heli-pubbing, savours the delicious barra burger, then catches, and cooks, black pepper mud crab. Delicious!

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: San Pedro Atocpan is a small town that produces 60% of the mole eaten in Mexico. Taste mole in all its mouthwatering forms, including the elegant mole madre, red mole, and an herbacious mole verde with fish that will knock your socks off.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: In the land of the tortilla, bread is often overlooked. If Chef Elena Reygadas has anything to say about it, however, bread will soon rise as an important player in Mexican cuisine, and she certainly has the right tools to effect change.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Tamales, tamales. From iconic corn-husked versions at the casual Tamales Teresita, as well as the denser, banana-leaf-wrapped Chiapanecos style, sold by a family outside the historic San Juan Bautisa church. At home, Rick prepares a surprising sweet corn tamale.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: London, England: In London, Tony attempts to dispel the myth that all English food is disgusting and over-boiled. Tony tries Nose to Tail Eating, explores traditional fare at Pie and Mash Shoppes, and then visits a predominantly Indian community.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Scotland: Beginning in Glasgow, Tony experiences the heart-clogging glory of deep fried pizza, deep fried mars bars, and deep fried pickled eggs! Moving on to more traditional fare, Tony tastes haggis and learns to hunt and fish for his food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Morocco (Cities): Tony is invited to experience the culinary heart and distinct walled medinas (districts) of the Moroccan city Fes.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy kicks things off with a fragrant Turmeric and Dill Fish dish. Student Joe Swash's first lesson is Duck Spring Rolls. Jeremy also visits an oyster farm and hits the beach where he prepares oysters three ways. Got room for ice cream?

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy starts with a fresh and delicious Steamed Salmon. Joe learns how to prepare Sesame Prawn Toast. Jeremy then makes Vietnamese Lemongrass Pork Chops before baking a classic- Chocolate Chip Cookies that contain a secret ingredient.

programme.title: Culinary Travels With Dave Eckert
programme.desc: Journey with Dave Eckert and experience divine culinary creations from exotic and alluring Mendoza, Argentina. Wine and dine in style as Dave reveals the passion behind the cuisine of this amazing culture.

programme.title: Culinary Travels With Dave Eckert
programme.desc: Culinary captain Dave Eckert embarks on an amazing cruise that is sure to delight, no matter if you are on the water or onshore. Sample a variety of taste profiles, from German sausages to the vines behind the wines of Austria.

programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Island Feast
programme.desc: On the stunning island of Corsica, Yotam discovers how the local terrain, called the maquis, is infused in the flavors of the food when he meets with the island's most celebrated chefs and food producers who share the cuisine they love.

programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Island Feast
programme.desc: On the dreamy island of Mallorca, Yotam leaves the busy beaches behind and heads inland to search for authentic local cuisine and ingredients that inspire him to create a few culinary masterpieces of his own in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: Phil eagerly awaits his chance to enjoy, and learn the secrets behind, the divine cuisine found inside DC Restaurant by Darren Chin, a Chef whose inspiration is derived from the high level of satisfaction his guests continually experience.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: Modesto Marini was a trailblazer in bringing high-end cuisine to Malaysia. Join Phil at Marini's on 57 where Chef Marini reveals why his restaurant is Malaysia's most iconic rooftop bar, Italian Restaurant, and whisky and cigar lounge.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: One of the key attributes that makes the Epicurean Market at Marina Bay Sands so special is the concentration of fresh, curated produce from all around the world. Also, Chef David Thompson takes you behind the scenes in his kitchen.

programme.title: The Toque 12
programme.desc: Toque 12 kicks off this new season with vigor. Join host Phillip Davenport as he tours Malaysia's provocative culinary world that infuses a spectrum of flavors in its cuisine and meet those who have influenced Malaysia's culinary success.

programme.title: My Fishing Cape Cod- Fishing the Fall Run
programme.desc: It’s fall on Cape Cod, and big striped bass and bluefish are running in the surf. Join host Ryan Collins and Dave Steeves of the Goose Hummock Shops and TheMightyFish.com, for a morning of big surf (and big fish) on topwater plugs and the fly rod.

programme.desc: Salt of the Earth

programme.title: Key West Florida- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: "Fun in the Sun" is given a whole new meaning in this episode as Erik The Travel Guy takes you down to Mile Zero to set sail and get some step by step snorkel instruction. He catches the island vibe on Duval Street, learns how to play a conch shell and shows you how to make an authentic Key Lime Pie with a local celebrity, Kermit.

programme.title: Demolition Derby in New England- Part 5
programme.desc: Demolition Derby in New England- Part 5

programme.title: Thacher Island- Above New England
programme.desc: Thacher Island- Above New England

programme.title: Mackinac Island MI- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: Time to grab the oat bag and saddle up, folks! Erik and the Crew are hopping on a ferry and heading to a place where horses replace automobiles, and time truly slows down. They’ll explore the island’s breathtaking natural beauty, visit the famous Grand Hotel, fish in Lake Huron, stroll downtown enjoying great food and live music and even attempt a little fudge making.

programme.title: Spring Thaw on Herring Pond in Plymouth- Above New England
programme.desc: When a hint of Spring is in the air and the ice begins its process of melting, a beautiful event takes place where the water ways feel and look as though they are filled with shimmering diamonds. Pretty soon this body of fresh water will be occupied with pontoon boats filled with party goers and campers in canoes from the local Camp Bournedale. However, in the meantime, let's enjoy the moment and take in the beauty from this rare point in time. Shot by Chuck Nilosek from Drone New England.

programme.title: Provincetown- Above New England

programme.title: Acadia Maine will take your breath away!
programme.desc: One of the most visited areas in Maine is Acadia National Park. Whether you climb to the top of Cadillac Mountain or venture to the rocky coast lines of Bar Harbor, you will be thrilled at each time you turn your head. Enjoy this one of kind flight over this New England treasure.

programme.title: Hingham after Snow Storm- Above New England
programme.desc: Hingham is a beautiful community south of Boston that offers many things to many people. However, on this particular day, PRTV decided to show you this town from a whole new vantage point. The beauty is enhanced by a thick layer of mother natures frosting, thanks to a brutal blizzard from the days before.

programme.title: Bar Harbor Maine- A coastal Gem
programme.desc: Bar Harbor is tough to get to from Boston but it is worth the drive up the coast. Once there you will be enveloped in what a New England sea side fishing community used to be. With the proximity so close to Canada, the types of people walking the streets will delight you to no end. Watch as the boats leave for their long days of fishing, lobstering or taking tourists out for a day of sightseeing.

programme.title: Buzzards Bay/Buttermilk Bay- Above Massachusetts
programme.desc: Buzzards Bay is home to the amazing Mass Maritime Academy and is considered part of the Gateway to Cape Cod, along with Wareham. Nestled at the west end of the Cape Cod Canal and home to the world famous Cape Cod Canal Rail Road Draw Bridge, Buzzards Bay is a busy summer destination for folks looking for that special New England Sea Side experience. When there, you will be able to enjoy so many seafood restaurants, ice cream stands and even get to visit the National Marine Life Center right near the train bridge. Life is Great New England has a full episode dedicated to this section of the state and is worth checking out! Don't forget to check out the world famous Buzzards Bay Oyster Festival that takes place each May right beneath the rail road bridge by the canal. This video also flys over Buttermilk Bay, which is a neighborhood and section of Bourne, Buzzards Bay, Plymouth and Wareham that shares this distinction.

programme.title: Hingham after Snow Storm- Above New England
programme.desc: Hingham is a beautiful community south of Boston that offers many things to many people. programme.title: Gettysburg- Beyond Your Backyard
programme.desc: In this episode Erik The Travel Guy is your guide on a historical journey to the scene of one of the bloodiest battles of the Civil War - The Battle of Gettysburg. You'll walk in the footprints of President Abraham Lincoln and learn why so many visitors are coming to Adams County for a part of American history - and a pint of their famous handcrafted apple cider!

programme.title: Spring Thaw on Herring Pond in Plymouth- Above New England
programme.desc: When a hint of Spring is in the air and the ice begins its process of melting, a beautiful event takes place where the water ways feel and look as though they are filled with shimmering diamonds. Pretty soon this body of fresh water will be occupied with pontoon boats filled with party goers and campers in canoes from the local Camp Bournedale. However, in the meantime, let's enjoy the moment and take in the beauty from this rare point in time. Shot by Chuck Nilosek from Drone New England.

programme.title: Indie Folk | Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Songs & Stories from Indie Folk Songwriters such as Billie Marten, Drew Erwin, Margo Cilker, Denitia, Jonathan Peyton, Gabe Quinn, Jeffrey Martin, BabyJake, Donavon Frankenreiter, Wild Rivers, Donovan Woods, Drew Harakal.

programme.title: Folk Playlist | OurVinyl Sessions
programme.desc: "Folk music" is a wide genre that encompasses a lot of music. This playlist is a collection of some of the best folk songs we've had the honor of filming, using a broad definition for "folk" - as we just have so many good videos to share here!

programme.title: Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel - Beauty
programme.desc: As a TV personality and style expert with over 25 years in the beauty business, Kim Gravel is on a mission to help women rediscover their innate worth, reignite their passions, and cultivate a deep love for themselves. That's why she created Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel- a QVC® Clean Beauty brand that reminds women that they're deserving of love, joy, and all the incredible experiences life has to offer. Enjoy fragrances that connect emotionally and performance-based cosmetics in a bold and vibrant color palette. All made easy, fun, optimistic, energetic, inspirational, and even audacious. Embrace your authentic (and confident) self, fall in love with life, and write your own empowering narrative with Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel.

programme.title: The Kim Gravel Show - From Wrongful Conviction to Freedom with Amanda Knox
programme.desc: The Kim Gravel Show is more than a video podcast: it’s a celebration of the stories that shape us with “America’s best girlfriend” and confidence coach, Kim Gravel. Featuring topical conversations with thought leaders, CEOs, and celebrities, listeners gain insight to help them discover their purpose, find their confidence, and love who they are. It's about laughing together and not taking ourselves too seriously. It's about the wisdom we've gathered and the hardships we've overcome. It's about looking at the woman you see in the mirror and remembering that she is beautiful inside and out. And it’s streaming free on the QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: Kim Gravel TONIGHT
programme.desc: Kim Gravel TONIGHT: She's a TV personality and style expert with over 25 years in the beauty business, plus the founder of her own fashion, cosmetics, and home décor lines. Now Kim Gravel joins us with her weekly show Kim Gravel TONIGHT to share the best of her brands for your wardrobe, your beauty bag and your home. Love who you are, what you wear and where you live when you tune in for Kim Gravel TONIGHT.

programme.title: Women with Control(R)-feat. Attitudes by Renee(R)
programme.desc: Since the start of the Women with Control line, Renee Greenstein has wiggled and danced her way into our hearts. Renee learned how clothing should fit "real women" during her experience as a fit model. Founded on her belief that "Style is not about size- it's about attitude," her line of Women with Control is designed to be the "real girl" solution you need whatever your age, size or body type, giving you control over how you look and feel most comfortable so you can take on the day with attitude. The collection is designed to help smooth, flatter and support every curve with comfort in styles and colors you'll love, while still being easy to wear, care for, and even pack-so your style can come with you wherever life takes you. Build the perfect look and shape for your body type with Women with Control-featuring Attitudes by Renee, on QVC.

programme.title: LOGO by Lori Goldstein(R)
programme.desc: New York's Lori Goldstein is one of the most influential fashion stylists in the industry, having worked with leading photographers, top fashion magazines and legendary designers over the last three decades. Known as the "insider's insider," Lori brings her impeccable taste and eclectic sense of style to QVC® with LOGO by Lori Goldstein® - a collection of contemporary separates and accessories inspired by Lori's unparalleled imagination and her keen ability to set the trends. Let Lori show you how to let your personal style shine through and love how you look as she shares her signature collection of fashion, footwear, handbags and accessories. Add some star-power to your wardrobe and have fun with fashion when you wear LOGO by Lori Goldstein.

programme.title: Healthy Living
programme.desc: Take a proactive approach to your health, physical fitness and well-being with this well-rounded selection of products designed to improve your quality of life and help put your goals within reach. Look for dietary supplements and programs, good-for-you foods and fitness equipment, plus personal care items to enhance your environment, monitor your health and to help you enjoy a healthy and fit life.

programme.title: Susan Graver Style
programme.desc: As QVC's best-selling fashion designer, Susan Graver brings trend-right yet timeless designs to her classic collection, Susan Graver Style. Susan learned what women love to wear early on when she designed her own line for a leading retailer, but she has dedicated most of her career to creating this chic collection especially for her devoted QVC customers. Featuring Susan's signature, easy-care fabrics, the collection offers everything from versatile wardrobe staples to globally inspired looks with designer details. Shop luxe tops, sweaters, pants, denim and more in flattering silhouettes. Discover delightfully unexpected pairings of colors, patterns, prints and textures. Designed to help you feel polished and pulled together whether you're dressing up for a special occasion or going casual for a laid-back weekend, it's easy to make every outfit look fresh and new with Susan Graver Style.

programme.title: Shawn On Style
programme.desc: Program Host Shawn Killinger has a distinct style that's all her own ... a little lux ... a little laid back ... a LOTTA fun ... and she's an open book ready to help you level up your look Monday nights during Shawn On Style. Join Shawn weekly for fresh fashion, fresh dish, and unexpected ways to pull it all together as only she can. Whether you want to dial things up for date night, add a touch of flair to your everyday wear, or elevate your essentials, join Shawn On Style as she talks trends, swaps style stories with today's tastemakers, and shows you how to build a wardrobe that's authentically, unapologetically YOU during Shawn On Style, part of Fashion's Night In, Mondays on QVC®.

programme.title: 50+ & Unfiltered - Shedding the Mask
programme.desc: Let’s be real – age *is* a number. But most importantly, it’s a superpower. Get inspired to tap into yours during 50+ & Unfiltered with Shawn Killinger, an original video podcast series on the QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service. Every week, join the candid conversations between Program Host Shawn Killinger and her special guests as they get real about the topics only women 50+ can relate to – from hot flashes to hobbies and everything in between. Nothing’s off-limits or too taboo (that went out the door years ago), so you’ll always feel seen, heard, and supported by a community of women who just get it. Shop a collection of guests’ favorite products and brands designed to inspire your next phase of life by searching “50+ & Unfiltered” on QVC.com. Watch new episodes every week or catch up on demand, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: Belle by Kim Gravel - Fashion - All Sale Prices - All Free Shipping
programme.desc: Believe in Your Own Beauty with Belle by Kim Gravel. Founder Kim Gravel knows how to bring out the beauty in every woman - from working for major cosmetics and fashion brands to designing her own clothing and styling countless fashion shoots to having her own Lifetime TV show transforming women all around the country, Gravel's passion is to empower every woman to be her beautiful best self. Exclusive to QVC®, the Belle by Kim Gravel collection of figure-focused fashion helps you create a head-to-toe look that flatters your body no matter your shape and empowers you to Believe in Your Own Beauty.

programme.title: Me by Jennie Garth - Fashion Clearance
programme.desc: Inspired by her iconic TV character's bold "I Choose Me" statement, actress Jennie Garth invites you to put yourself first and express the "Me" you want to be in her signature fashion with an effortless yet chic California vibe. Me by Jennie Garth features thoughtfully, curated capsule collections inspired by the colors and textures of some of Jennie's favorite locations across the country, in fabrics that feel as good as they look. Embrace the beauty of choice with Me by Jennie Garth, designed exclusively for QVC®.

programme.title: Menopause Monday
programme.desc: As QVC® continues our mission to help women 50+ feel seen, supported and celebrated, Program Host and Quintessential 50 Ambassador Sandra Bennett is bringing you the essentials you need (or didn't know you needed!) for the changes, challenges, and everything-in-between during Menopause Monday. From supplements and beauty to cooling options for your home, wardrobe and more, Menopause Monday is your source for menopositive ideas to make this time in your life your Age of Possibility.

Exclusive to QVC®, the Belle by Kim Gravel collection of figure-focused fashion helps you create a head-to-toe look that flatters your body no matter your shape and empowers you to Believe in Your Own Beauty.

programme.title: Me by Jennie Garth - Fashion Clearance
programme.desc: Inspired by her iconic TV character's bold "I Choose Me" statement, actress Jennie Garth invites you to put yourself first and express the "Me" you want to be in her signature fashion with an effortless yet chic California vibe. Me by Jennie Garth features thoughtfully, curated capsule collections inspired by the colors and textures of some of Jennie's favorite locations across the country, in fabrics that feel as good as they look. Embrace the beauty of choice with Me by Jennie Garth, designed exclusively for QVC®.

programme.title: Menopause Monday
programme.desc: As QVC® continues our mission to help women 50+ feel seen, supported and celebrated, Program Host and Quintessential 50 Ambassador Sandra Bennett is bringing you the essentials you need (or didn't know you needed!) for the changes, challenges, and everything-in-between during Menopause Monday. From supplements and beauty to cooling options for your home, wardrobe and more, Menopause Monday is your source for menopositive ideas to make this time in your life your Age of Possibility.

programme.title: Women with Control® Clearance-ft. Att. by Renee
programme.desc: Since the start of the Women with Control line, Renee Greenstein has wiggled and danced her way into our hearts. Renee learned how clothing should fit "real women" during her experience as a fit model. Founded on her belief that "Style is not about size- it's about attitude," her line of Women with Control is designed to be the "real girl" solution you need whatever your age, size or body type, giving you control over how you look and feel most comfortable so you can take on the day with attitude. The collection is designed to help smooth, flatter and support every curve with comfort in styles and colors you'll love, while still being easy to wear, care for, and even pack-so your style can come with you wherever life takes you. Build the perfect look and shape for your body type with Women with Control-featuring Attitudes by Renee, on QVC.

programme.title: LOGO by Lori Goldstein
programme.desc: New York's Lori Goldstein is one of the most influential fashion stylists in the industry, having worked with leading photographers, top fashion magazines and legendary designers over the last three decades. Known as the "insider's insider," Lori brings her impeccable taste and eclectic sense of style to QVC® with LOGO by Lori Goldstein® - a collection of contemporary separates and accessories inspired by Lori's unparalleled imagination and her keen ability to set the trends. Let Lori show you how to let your personal style shine through and love how you look as she shares her signature collection of fashion, footwear, handbags and accessories. Add some star-power to your wardrobe and have fun with fashion when you wear LOGO by Lori Goldstein.

programme.title: Cubii Compact Elliptical
programme.desc: "Sweat it out while sitting down with the Cubii Jr. Compact Under Desk Elliptical. The compact, desk elliptical helps keep you moving - whether you're at your desk or on your sofa. Its whisper quiet, ergonomic design allows you to multitask and exercise your core, quads, and more all while you work, read or watch TV. Track your stats throughout the day to view your calories burnt, distance, and more as you discover another way to keep fit while you sit during Cubii Compact Elliptical. "

programme.title: Susan Graver Style
programme.desc: As QVC's best-selling fashion designer, Susan Graver brings trend-right yet timeless designs to her classic collection, Susan Graver Style. Susan learned what women love to wear early on when she designed her own line for a leading retailer, but she has dedicated most of her career to creating this chic collection especially for her devoted QVC customers. Featuring Susan's signature, easy-care fabrics, the collection offers everything from versatile wardrobe staples to globally inspired looks with designer details. Shop luxe tops, sweaters, pants, denim and more in flattering silhouettes. Discover delightfully unexpected pairings of colors, patterns, prints and textures. Designed to help you feel polished and pulled together whether you're dressing up for a special occasion or going casual for a laid-back weekend, it's easy to make every outfit look fresh and new with Susan Graver Style.

programme.title: Shawn On Style
programme.desc: Program Host Shawn Killinger has a distinct style that's all her own ... a little lux ... a little laid back ... a LOTTA fun ... and she's an open book ready to help you level up your look Monday nights during Shawn On Style. Join Shawn weekly for fresh fashion, fresh dish, and unexpected ways to pull it all together as only she can. Whether you want to dial things up for date night, add a touch of flair to your everyday wear, or elevate your essentials, join Shawn On Style as she talks trends, swaps style stories with today's tastemakers, and shows you how to build a wardrobe that's authentically, unapologetically YOU during Shawn On Style, part of Fashion's Night In, Mondays on QVC®.

programme.title: 50+ & Unfiltered - Shedding the Mask
programme.desc: Let’s be real – age *is* a number. But most importantly, it’s a superpower. Get inspired to tap into yours during 50+ & Unfiltered with Shawn Killinger, an original video podcast series on the QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service. Every week, join the candid conversations between Program Host Shawn Killinger and her special guests as they get real about the topics only women 50+ can relate to – from hot flashes to hobbies and everything in between. Nothing’s off-limits or too taboo (that went out the door years ago), so you’ll always feel seen, heard, and supported by a community of women who just get it. Shop a collection of guests’ favorite products and brands designed to inspire your next phase of life by searching “50+ & Unfiltered” on QVC.com. Watch new episodes every week or catch up on demand, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: Shawn on Holiday Style
programme.desc: Program Host Shawn Killinger has a distinct style that's all her own ... a little luxe ... a little laid back ... a LOTTA fun ... and she's an open book ready to help you level up your look during Shawn On Holiday Style. Join Shawn for fresh fashion, fresh dish, and unexpected ways to pull it all together as only she can. Whether you want to sparkle and shine at holiday parties, add a festive flair to your everyday wear, or find fab gifts for your fave fashionistas, join Shawn On Holiday Style as she talks trends, swaps style stories with today's tastemakers, and shows you how to build a holiday wardrobe that's authentically, unapologetically YOU during Shawn On Holiday Style.

programme.title: Laura Geller Makeup Studio
programme.desc: A top New York City makeup artist, Laura Geller is known in the industry as an innovator who creates makeup colors and formulas that appeal to all women. Her approach to makeup, and her popular Laura Geller Makeup Collection, is that it should deliver professional quality results with simple, no instructions required application. Her experience has led her to create a line of multi-purpose baked color cosmetics, her uniquely Italian, handcrafted Baked Color Cosmetics Collection, designed to adjust to your skin tone and deliver more than ordinary powder, with exceptional luminosity for a flawless, radiant look. Discover the believable beauty of baked Laura Geller makeup, iconic favorites such as Laura Geller Spackle and innovative formulas and inspiring new products in wonderfully wearable colors based on real beauty needs, not soon-to-be-forgotten trends. Let Laura Geller take the guesswork out of cosmetics application with expert advice, time-saving tips and high-performance products for easily achievable looks. For makeup that's inviting, innovative, informative and ingenious - look no further than Laura Geller Makeup Studio on QVC(R). Laura Geller ... Beauty Ingenuity.

programme.title: Peace Love World - Fashion
programme.desc: Wear what makes you feel good with Peace Love World. In 1999, creator Alina Villasante started an annual tradition of gathering her girlfriends for a night of fun called "The Love Party," at which she would offer guests uniquely designed T-shirts to commemorate the celebration. After her inspirational clothing designs generated considerable demand, she created a full line of relaxed, hip apparel incorporating her beloved symbols, "Peace, Love and Happiness." She opened the first Peace Love World retail store in Miami in 2009. Today the brand has a dedicated celebrity following and is sold in boutiques around the world-and now you can shop her collection here at QVC, too! Shop casual-cool tees and tanks, cozy hoodies and pants, jeans, outerwear and more to spread love and positivity wherever you go. Peace Love World-the clothes that give you life.

programme.title: Shawn Saves Christmas
programme.desc: Here at QVC, we know how stressful the holidays can be: from parties, to gifts, to decorating and beyond - you've got a lot on your plate! But never fear, Holiday Super Host Shawn Killinger is here! Join Shawn (and her Seasonal Sidekick Courtney Khondabi) as they share their favorite gifts, home decor, gourmet food, and entertaining tips to make the season stress-free during Shawn Saves Christmas.

programme.title: Over 50 & Fabulous Aftershow - The Power of Boundaries with Mally and Lawrence Zarian
programme.desc: What would we talk about if there was a safe space where (almost) nothing was off-limits? Over 50 & Fabulous "goes there," as celebrity makeup artist Mally Roncal & friends get real about real stuff.

programme.title: Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel - Beauty
programme.desc: As a TV personality and style expert with over 25 years in the beauty business, Kim Gravel is on a mission to help women rediscover their innate worth, reignite their passions, and cultivate a deep love for themselves. That's why she created Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel- a QVC® Clean Beauty brand that reminds women that they're deserving of love, joy, and all the incredible experiences life has to offer. Enjoy fragrances that connect emotionally and performance-based cosmetics in a bold and vibrant color palette. All made easy, fun, optimistic, energetic, inspirational, and even audacious. Embrace your authentic (and confident) self, fall in love with life, and write your own empowering narrative with Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel.

programme.title: All About Wellness
programme.desc: Find balance with easy ways to energize your life, feel stronger and more confident, and even save precious time. QVC® is here to help you commit to your wellness in different ways. Start with great fitness accessories, shoes, and apparel for easy-moving workouts. When you need to relax and pamper yourself you can bring spa days right into your home with our assortment, anytime you need it. Get tasty ideas for your next meal and nutritional supplements, no matter your lifestyle. See how small changes can make a big difference for your well-being during All About Wellness.

programme.desc: As QVC's best-selling fashion designer, Susan Graver brings trend-right yet timeless designs to her classic collection, Susan Graver Style. Susan learned what women love to wear early on when she designed her own line for a leading retailer, but she has dedicated most of her career to creating this chic collection especially for her devoted QVC customers. Featuring Susan's signature, easy-care fabrics, the collection offers everything from versatile wardrobe staples to globally inspired looks with designer details. Shop luxe tops, sweaters, pants, denim and more in flattering silhouettes. Discover delightfully unexpected pairings of colors, patterns, prints and textures. Designed to help you feel polished and pulled together whether you're dressing up for a special occasion or going casual for a laid-back weekend, it's easy to make every outfit look fresh and new with Susan Graver Style.

programme.title: Age of Possibility Promo (with QVC+ End Card)
programme.desc: Let’s be real – age *is* a number. But most importantly, it’s a superpower. Get inspired to tap into yours during 50+ & Unfiltered with Shawn Killinger, an original video podcast series on the QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service. Every week, join the candid conversations between Program Host Shawn Killinger and her special guests as they get real about the topics only women 50+ can relate to – from hot flashes to hobbies and everything in between. Nothing’s offlimits or too taboo (that went out the door years ago), so you’ll always feel seen, heard, and supported by a community of women who just get it. Shop a collection of guests’ favorite products and brands designed to inspire your next phase of life by searching “50+ & Unfiltered” on QVC.com. Watch new episodes every week or catch up on demand, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: All About Wellness
programme.desc: Find balance with easy ways to energize your life, feel stronger and more confident, and even save precious time. QVC® is here to help you commit to your wellness in different ways. Start with great fitness accessories, shoes, and apparel for easy-moving workouts. When you need to relax and pamper yourself you can bring spa days right into your home with our assortment, anytime you need it. Get tasty ideas for your next meal and nutritional supplements, no matter your lifestyle. See how small changes can make a big difference for your well-being during All About Wellness.

programme.title: Susan Graver Style Clearance
programme.desc: As QVC's best-selling fashion designer, Susan Graver brings trend-right yet timeless designs to her classic collection, Susan Graver Style. Susan learned what women love to wear early on when she designed her own line for a leading retailer, but she has dedicated most of her career to creating this chic collection especially for her devoted QVC customers. Featuring Susan's signature, easy-care fabrics, the collection offers everything from versatile wardrobe staples to globally inspired looks with designer details. Shop luxe tops, sweaters, pants, denim and more in flattering silhouettes. Discover delightfully unexpected pairings of colors, patterns, prints and textures. Designed to help you feel polished and pulled together whether you're dressing up for a special occasion or going casual for a laid-back weekend, it's easy to make every outfit look fresh and new with Susan Graver Style.

programme.title: Shawn Saves Christmas
programme.desc: Here at QVC, we know how stressful the holidays can be: from parties, to gifts, to decorating and beyond - you've got a lot on your plate! But never fear, Holiday Super Host Shawn Killinger is here! Join Shawn (and her Seasonal Sidekick Courtney Khondabi) as they share their favorite gifts, home decor, gourmet food, and entertaining tips to make the season stress-free during Shawn Saves Christmas.

programme.title: Shawn On Style
programme.desc: Program Host Shawn Killinger has a distinct style that's all her own ... a little lux ... a little laid back ... a LOTTA fun ... and she's an open book ready to help you level up your look Monday nights during Shawn On Style. Join Shawn weekly for fresh fashion, fresh dish, and unexpected ways to pull it all together as only she can. Whether you want to dial things up for date night, add a touch of flair to your everyday wear, or elevate your essentials, join Shawn On Style as she talks trends, swaps style stories with today's tastemakers, and shows you how to build a wardrobe that's authentically, unapologetically YOU during Shawn On Style, part of Fashion's Night In, Mondays on QVC®.

programme.title: Belle by Kim Gravel - Fashion
programme.desc: Believe in Your Own Beauty with Belle by Kim Gravel. Founder Kim Gravel knows how to bring out the beauty in every woman - from working for major cosmetics and fashion brands to designing her own clothing and styling countless fashion shoots to having her own Lifetime TV show transforming women all around the country, Gravel's passion is to empower every woman to be her beautiful best self. Exclusive to QVC, the Belle by Kim Gravel collection of figure-focused fashion helps you create a head-to-toe look that flatters your body no matter your shape and empowers you to Believe in Your Own Beauty.

programme.title: The Kim Gravel Show - Stay Vibrant and Healthy as You Age with Joy Bauer
programme.desc: The Kim Gravel Show is a weekly podcast for women where you stop doubting and start believing in yourself. In each episode Kim tackles the topics that women care about in a way that will make you laugh, make you think, and help you see your life in a new, more positive way.

programme.title: Me by Jennie Garth - Fashion Clearance
programme.desc: Inspired by her iconic TV character's bold "I Choose Me" statement, actress Jennie Garth invites you to put yourself first and express the "Me" you want to be in her signature fashion with an effortless yet chic California vibe. Me by Jennie Garth features thoughtfully, curated capsule collections inspired by the colors and textures of some of Jennie's favorite locations across the country, in fabrics that feel as good as they look. Embrace the beauty of choice with Me by Jennie Garth, designed exclusively for QVC®.

programme.title: Belle by Kim Gravel - Fashion
programme.desc: Believe in Your Own Beauty with Belle by Kim Gravel. Founder Kim Gravel knows how to bring out the beauty in every woman - from working for major cosmetics and fashion brands to designing her own clothing and styling countless fashion shoots to having her own Lifetime TV show transforming women all around the country, Gravel's passion is to empower every woman to be her beautiful best self. Exclusive to QVC, the Belle by Kim Gravel collection of figure-focused fashion helps you create a head-to-toe look that flatters your body no matter your shape and empowers you to Believe in Your Own Beauty.

programme.title: MacKenzie-Childs - Home Decor
programme.desc: For more than 40 years, MacKenzie-Childs has created distinct home décor from an always imaginative point of view, fusing traditional, modern, and playful elements into pieces that shout with joy. Drawing from its rich, handcrafted heritage, MacKenzie-Childs designs everything imaginable for the home, including ceramic and enamel dinnerware, furniture that fearlessly mixes pattern and color, and home and garden accessories that are the perfect finishing touches. Its goal is to transform your home into your happy place and to make every corner of it-inside and outside-feel fresh and original. Inspiration comes from travels around the world, the beauty of its unique location on a 65-acre former dairy farm in Upstate New York, and from a firm belief in living life to its fullest.

programme.title: MacKenzie-Childs - Holiday Decor

programme.title: Alberti’s Tea for Two featuring MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Pour yourself a ‘cuppa alongside Program Host Alberti Popaj as he sets the table for high tea with the newest MacKenzie-Childs collection and helps you do the same! Alberti is sharing his own love for this imaginative brand as well as his styling suggestions featuring the uniquely distinct designs MacKenzie-Childs is known for, including vibrant dinnerware, fearless furniture, and whimsical home and garden accessories. Don’t miss a sip – it's all streaming free, only on QVC+. And shop the full MacKenzie-Childs Collection on QVC.com.

programme.title: MacKenzie-Childs: Alberti’s Emerald Garden Party
programme.desc: Impress your guests with the gorgeous MacKenzie-Childs Emerald Check collection, featuring styling tips from Alberti Popaj.

programme.desc: MacKenzie-Childs: Alberti’s Cozy Mocha Brunch

programme.title: LifeStyled - Deck the Halls with MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Are you suffering from inspiration frustration? Is your dream aesthetic just...well, a dream? No more! It’s time to make your vision a reality during LifeStyled. Whether you’re picturing something mild, wild, or anywhere in between, we’re got the simple steps and on-trend finds to take your look from drab to fab. Level up everything from your wardrobe to your home as you shop leading brands in fashion, decor, and more that effortlessly elevate your space and give you the look you’ve been searching for. It’s streaming free, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

Drawing from its rich, handcrafted heritage, MacKenzie-Childs designs everything imaginable for the home, including ceramic and enamel dinnerware, furniture that fearlessly mixes pattern and color, and home and garden accessories that are the perfect finishing touches. Its goal is to transform your home into your happy place and to make every corner of it-inside and outside-feel fresh and original. Inspiration comes from travels around the world, the beauty of its unique location on a 65-acre former dairy farm in Upstate New York, and from a firm belief in living life to its fullest.

programme.title: MacKenzie-Childs - Holiday Decor
programme.desc: For more than 40 years, MacKenzie-Childs has created distinct home décor from an always imaginative point of view, fusing traditional, modern, and playful elements into pieces that shout with joy. Drawing from its rich, handcrafted heritage, MacKenzie-Childs designs everything imaginable for the home, including ceramic and enamel dinnerware, furniture that fearlessly mixes pattern and color, and home and garden accessories that are the perfect finishing touches. This collection of Holiday Décor includes festive pieces that work back to your existing collection or provide a very merry beginning to new holiday traditions.

programme.title: Dishin' It - Magic Moments featuring MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Pull up a chair and get ready to dig into the tastiest talk show because these foodies are Dishin’ It out! Pull up to the most popular potluck in town where our hungry hosts are bringing you the beginner-friendly recipes they’ve been craving—as well as the how-tos, brands, and products you need to serve them up yourself! It’s a full course meal featuring food, fun, and friends. Watch and shop, only on the free QVC+ and HSN+ streaming service.

programme.title: LifeStyled - Christmas Magic with MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Are you suffering from inspiration frustration? Is your dream aesthetic just...well, a dream? No more! It’s time to make your vision a reality during LifeStyled. Whether you’re picturing something mild, wild, or anywhere in between, we’re got the simple steps and on-trend finds to take your look from drab to fab. Level up everything from your wardrobe to your home as you shop leading brands in fashion, decor, and more that effortlessly elevate your space and give you the look you’ve been searching for. It’s streaming free, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: Alberti’s Tea for Two featuring MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Pour yourself a ‘cuppa alongside Program Host Alberti Popaj as he sets the table for high tea with the newest MacKenzie-Childs collection and helps you do the same! Alberti is sharing his own love for this imaginative brand as well as his styling suggestions featuring the uniquely distinct designs MacKenzie-Childs is known for, including vibrant dinnerware, fearless furniture, and whimsical home and garden accessories. Don’t miss a sip – it's all streaming free, only on QVC+. And shop the full MacKenzie-Childs Collection on QVC.com.

programme.title: MacKenzie-Childs - Home Decor
programme.desc: For more than 40 years, MacKenzie-Childs has created distinct home décor from an always imaginative point of view, fusing traditional, modern, and playful elements into pieces that shout with joy. Drawing from its rich, handcrafted heritage, MacKenzie-Childs designs everything imaginable for the home, including ceramic and enamel dinnerware, furniture that fearlessly mixes pattern and color, and home and garden accessories that are the perfect finishing touches. Its goal is to transform your home into your happy place and to make every corner of it-inside and outside-feel fresh and original. Inspiration comes from travels around the world, the beauty of its unique location on a 65-acre former dairy farm in Upstate New York, and from a firm belief in living life to its fullest.

programme.title: MacKenzie-Childs - Holiday Decor
programme.desc: For more than 40 years, MacKenzie-Childs has created distinct home décor from an always imaginative point of view, fusing traditional, modern, and playful elements into pieces that shout with joy. Drawing from its rich, handcrafted heritage, MacKenzie-Childs designs everything imaginable for the home, including ceramic and enamel dinnerware, furniture that fearlessly mixes pattern and color, and home and garden accessories that are the perfect finishing touches. This collection of Holiday Décor includes festive pieces that work back to your existing collection or provide a very merry beginning to new holiday traditions.

programme.title: Alberti’s Tea for Two featuring MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Pour yourself a ‘cuppa alongside Program Host Alberti Popaj as he sets the table for high tea with the newest MacKenzie-Childs collection and helps you do the same! Alberti is sharing his own love for this imaginative brand as well as his styling suggestions featuring the uniquely distinct designs MacKenzie-Childs is known for, including vibrant dinnerware, fearless furniture, and whimsical home and garden accessories. Don’t miss a sip – it's all streaming free, only on QVC+. And shop the full MacKenzie-Childs Collection on QVC.com.

programme.title: LifeStyled - Christmas Magic with MacKenzie-Childs
programme.desc: Are you suffering from inspiration frustration? Is your dream aesthetic just...well, a dream? No more! It’s time to make your vision a reality during LifeStyled. Whether you’re picturing something mild, wild, or anywhere in between, we’re got the simple steps and on-trend finds to take your look from drab to fab. Level up everything from your wardrobe to your home as you shop leading brands in fashion, decor, and more that effortlessly elevate your space and give you the look you’ve been searching for. It’s streaming free, only on QVC+ and HSN+.
